body:
Before we can finalize all of our critical investments in grassroots organizing for September, we need to know whether we hit our August fundraising goal. If you're able to make a donation right now, | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852507a/45c30650/1c36eed9b/66e8d1b8/4148866223/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

Grassroots supporters like you are building a movement to meet our country's moment of crisis.

Side by side, by electing Democrats like Elizabeth up and down the ballot, we can choose compassion over cruelty, empathy over ego, facts over fear, and hope over hate.

But before we can finalize all of our critical investments in grassroots organizing for September, we need to know whether we hit our August fundraising goal.

**If you're able to make a donation right now, you can help power our movement and elect Democrats like Elizabeth up and down the ballot.

And by helping reach our goal by tomorrow's deadline, you can help make sure we don't need to scale back any of our plans to support the candidates Elizabeth's endorsed.**

**[So if you're in a place where you could make a financial contribution right now, it would go a long way. Please chip in $2 or whatever you can by midnight tomorrow to support Warren Democrats.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852507a/45c30650/1c36eed9b/66e8d1bb/4148866223/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLWF1ZzIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNVTIwRl9FT01fRUdSX1RfMjAyMDA4MzBfVjFTM19QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-aug20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMU20F_EOM_EGR_T_20200830_V1S3_P")**

name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: Hunt for Congress Weekly Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

I hope this email finds you well and that you and your loved ones were unharmed by Hurricane Laura this week. While Houston missed much of Laura's destruction, many of our neighbors in East Texas and Louisiana were not so fortunate. We all know the enduring heartbreak and struggle these storms leave behind; if you're able to lend a hand I encourage you to do so.

We are now just 65 days from Election Day and Team Hunt is making great headway in the 7th District. When your campaign is supported by so many enthusiastic and dedicated volunteers, you know you're moving in the right direction.

On Wednesday, we launched our first television advertisement of the general election, _America's Story_. In just five generations, my family has gone from slavery to West Point and the Ivy League. Only in America is my family's story possible. Our journey is emblematic of the American Dream envisioned by our founders and inspires me to fight to ensure future generations are able to participate in the way of life we have fought to protect.

[](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=c65afd50dcd34edf803d6e2db9c5a18e&_e=VS0jxKVFuZenG-Vww09nwTKa6jKBo54mZQIAtYA60zGkpmhLfLTSeilizabfyIMHB0inrDKSXxVI3Rxis12hix-wMp8habPoKLi9kyUdbP5nYBaZQjE0Jms644hvmA7bYW3VciSwEwTDiC9w8PcKgC3EB5wHramqpm6w6Y1tCj6T4OjL9N9rSHlhRQEF6iUUvNnwfFu2OXIpTzc9rmQ8MhnYlxoD6PYC_hWAc9p_KCdXOW8k44ipYfYY3Asa4o2BLL___r2xP4IFZNjK31gQV2WffzE7-HJMlAL0Qd2eu3un0MYmjCuTfLdWFOcsaG0e)

This week I was honored to announce the National Federation of Independent Business' (NFIB) endorsement of my campaign in the 7th District. The NFIB is one of the Nation's leading advocates for small businesses and I look forward to fighting for our small businesses and the economic opportunity they bring to our community.

On Thursday, I was humbled to receive Dr. Steven Croft's endorsement. Dr. Croft is a member of the Team Hunt Medical Professionals Advisory Board, a group of Houston-area medical professionals dedicated to supporting my campaign and joining the conversation as we address challenges and opportunities facing our healthcare system. Thank you for your support, Dr. Croft, I look forward to working with you.

_In case you missed it_ , this week Texas Business Daily published an article detailing a bill cosponsored by my opponent, Lizzie Fletcher, that would make it more difficult for state and local law enforcement to access life-saving rescue equipment, including the five-ton trucks that rescued thousands of Houstonians during Hurricane Harvey. Instead of protecting this valuable resource for Houston's first-responders, Fletcher chose to pile on layers of bureaucratic red tape and put barriers between our law enforcement and this important equipment. I am deeply troubled by Representative Fletcher's wholehearted support of this bill and will fight to ensure our first responders are properly equipped when disasters strike. You can find the article [here](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=c65afd50dcd34edf803d6e2db9c5a18e&_e=VS0jxKVFuZenG-Vww09nwQpKuYmDB9P8n0n9PtFSF8nIrooCElWgNM4egb4JCyoBb8Etl_1f4vCphayvriX52TXgq4OPHwf6OMdif72hNVrc9kUfftdcZtgpAmOjOAcpn1PMXjYrisXgqmQT4OwJfJxTapFtIGMp6e49SqX0pCKniu2lcYl8ajsZEvyKB1bPaB4ro6hew6x9P4CxQvVnmegf1EPmBJx0K13BWG1hQtcjnTW5Lvj54_YW6l1KQNHYyZmgyXgMKNJKNni_cLyG3DKHS42YDk5qB7sYNs9RsBMV_-WWLwO6YF1pdf5w8REdC-209ME2inZnrJ8tEpMCBOFs36Ijs7AWtnABRSE4n-KEHaa5-i_xt4zSrEc8zajq_OW3kc_HNbFvmaQPNU_-jA%3D%3D).

Thank you for all you have done and continue to do to help us flip this seat red in November. Your steadfast support is critical to the success of our campaign; I am so glad to have you on Team Hunt!

Sincerely,
Wesley

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=c65afd50dcd34edf803d6e2db9c5a18e&_e=VS0jxKVFuZenG-Vww09nwWfgHO5JHahljgKMc4T8wQ-orEV8SWaeXdu3zjah8zObd_G7g9K11Xd9OSMJjCl5Iu7gQbkWHcDYCMfC-rdD2OwKCFJPraBvq_SEiAfccau8EsdQNKnX3DA48noM0fVxz6YQStThsgNC_LGnOuD7CBqgvMVtOHkPVYQrQL7-oYUOIpHy5M0MysvC-xIrKUD-I44UNScDmV-ouLlmUnxQ-m4DQgcxNncON7GAVhJJ4wH_ds1Ce-m8Xvfxi4h4YhhArWEnpf-E6q6xp3ZyZf8PmV0%3D)****
---

Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.
---

Click here to [unsubscribe](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_s=c65afd50dcd34edf803d6e2db9c5a18e&_t=RRWDudmtyAUmYQZlINS2soBYcXxFLKUbG8pg1R3qNBqr05PTTjzfIT1wq9SXCh1htNE_WOIgHdpmuMKR8fqylKwcFjWpnQLUxm6o11JPn-wvh52UCCvYBIHxkn_r8egVFNS4SP3LGTN0JG2cFPUcA7yclcrYlhLlYkllMxSzxhk%3D).

name: Powered By People (BetoORourke.com)
subject: Have you signed up to flip Texas blue yet?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

Friend,

If you’ve been waiting for your chance to hop in and get involved this
election, but have been waiting for the right moment, let’s be clear: The
right moment is now!

Tomorrow, we’re kicking off phone banks with amazing state house
candidates from around Texas. Our goal is to make sure voters across our
great state know the names of every Democrat on their ballot, from the
presidential ticket all the way down to the state house, so no Texan is
confused about which candidates are fighting for us — for all of us. Will
you join us and make calls this week, Friend?

Upcoming events:
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43024?source=ema20200830-103305&t=1001&akid=103305%2E444211%2EVMYUuS ]Virtual Phone Bank with local candidates and Beto
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43024?source=ema20200830-103305&t=1002&akid=103305%2E444211%2EVMYUuS ]Monday, August 31, 6:30 pm CT

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43024?source=ema20200830-103305&t=1003&akid=103305%2E444211%2EVMYUuS ]Get more info or RSVP »

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43025?source=ema20200830-103305&t=1004&akid=103305%2E444211%2EVMYUuS ]Virtual Phone Bank with local candidates and Beto
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43025?source=ema20200830-103305&t=1005&akid=103305%2E444211%2EVMYUuS ]Wednesday, September 2, 6:30 pm CT

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43025?source=ema20200830-103305&t=1006&akid=103305%2E444211%2EVMYUuS ]Get more info or RSVP »

We’re not going into November with anything left on the table. Are you?

See you on the dialer,
Powered by People

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1007&akid=103305%2E444211%2EVMYUuS

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

body:
Here’s what you missed during President Trump’s rally on Friday. | |
---
[ ](http://links.mowersforcongress.com/u/click?_t=40916cb2eb47469286d89e7d5b57adeb&_m=3b8633b806df4706a923b7ccc5053357&_e=DikXPvLL3rnF6BkMFWnDlRsascBMoaKe1OzUepRmLKAZyySaHCfe0hNBGYFmt-YlPDP26mebjFHMt4Y0JDo5-TNSt4LDtM0o-S_G4zozoRL7Ql2RjlKR-30RyPsqvykrqMDuhftv0WwttlO9K0aOPNFVDryRxE-aO7T6gTKC6_wmYZ0pk0RuEO355d5Sp0OQQ1z102BaIJ5BH32Xt3reCLpDmIUMS0u8tNf4uOilgPnTZAMgnZHkQ8bi1GovEjEw7TfiXz5yDiOMYliSVgYiLZOeTN2rV8rkWMcLMWnY1viXP_5q5Iu-e1tp7XMm1YEy5seCE0bke89VMyNHoCP3xClWEebCulm836a9rrNtZAZdPYeS7yIAq1-I47FJ__D-BEAG26trYvob_oU5R04F9DZqa9ZekuoYpPTLirFypXPAzjyVYTrLIf75sU_CvaP5H79Bt4CMY0b-6MMBYDX_pfM_jDjmyWvw7EjPQ3nKSpq5g9mHs62OlQZ1oIvTKeWy)

Friend,

I wanted to follow up with you in case you missed the rally on Friday. I wrote down some reflections about what President Trump said, and I thought I’d share them with you.
|
---
[ ](http://links.mowersforcongress.com/u/click?_t=40916cb2eb47469286d89e7d5b57adeb&_m=3b8633b806df4706a923b7ccc5053357&_e=DikXPvLL3rnF6BkMFWnDlRsascBMoaKe1OzUepRmLKAZyySaHCfe0hNBGYFmt-YlPDP26mebjFHMt4Y0JDo5-fhiz6Y69H2wOZAAOZHYKz06I5eVfKDdtkd-eAhRPaANMZfI7zGw9vYC8c0Xvj_oSbQoZGJ4MEV2catx9KC6jN62rXnQWLhN6lSaodIGaVvWzmJ5pSTmh_9G2Nehl5SY6JEt9BI-A4gcK1EiDQo7_VBdX2wVXbu_h8xBl7FIFGssQqCw3AEms2MZ8zBW2csy_LykDfDihVyDYblrrQv9HHnXhAX3NLA_EbXQHZ-fVdCrtH-VgvPG-UXNYzEbPzyrsVJdKbjIdc5ml-CtMFEDS4V0j3V7GkHyHK6Mf8V7NukIf8mmuSktfxUKqxbeyfcTL6T1bt2ViFZHIVY0tFW97HCNYqSmfeiuNxEyNbcOOxonesmRBykrTLVkkq3Ky2pwR6_T1SFuTrxzJTwX5P6F7rrgSfxLhEvvByobcqJiW5qj)
|

America has been put to the test this year. From the pandemic to violent protests, our nation has faced crisis after crisis. But not even 2020 can break our American spirit. **We can and will persevere through this difficult season. **
|
---
[ ](http://links.mowersforcongress.com/u/click?_t=40916cb2eb47469286d89e7d5b57adeb&_m=3b8633b806df4706a923b7ccc5053357&_e=DikXPvLL3rnF6BkMFWnDlRsascBMoaKe1OzUepRmLKAZyySaHCfe0hNBGYFmt-YlPDP26mebjFHMt4Y0JDo5-fhiz6Y69H2wOZAAOZHYKz06I5eVfKDdtkd-eAhRPaANMZfI7zGw9vYC8c0Xvj_oSbQoZGJ4MEV2catx9KC6jN62rXnQWLhN6lSaodIGaVvWzmJ5pSTmh_9G2Nehl5SY6JEt9BI-A4gcK1EiDQo7_VBdX2wVXbu_h8xBl7FIFGssQqCw3AEms2MZ8zBW2csy_LykDfDihVyDYblrrQv9HHmZRTShieSCFpSGejMjv3lWaNgCy7lRAYPt4gc72Qa2pjndQdBYtoADTwg0rMET_wTdlDQHm3TNb7SY3VuOFV5XyDb7NftizUvfCLg9UAdGr-jYPAvhc9lDwYWGwoDuwZG9dNL0Gz84eImTScSgBb8J9ybQg80H-4mK_zT20h01An6y7ZkVl3o1T6ffXACGDg8EDpTryJpj7bBcYdDcNN4E)
|
---
But the Left wants you to believe otherwise. Democrats are trying to convince the American people that we’ll only be able to weather this storm if we hand over all of our freedom and allow the government to make all of our decisions for us.

**Under no circumstances can we allow that to happen, friend. **

President Trump is right - America is the greatest country in the world, and it’s up to us to keep it that way.

That means taking back the House and getting rid of as many radical Dems as possible in Congress. I’m on a mission to flip this District and send radical Democrat Chris Pappas packing in November, but I can’t do it alone.

**Can you help me flip NH-01 and kick another radical Democrat out of Washington by[chipping in just $5 to my campaign](http://links.mowersforcongress.com/u/click?_t=40916cb2eb47469286d89e7d5b57adeb&_m=3b8633b806df4706a923b7ccc5053357&_e=DikXPvLL3rnF6BkMFWnDlRsascBMoaKe1OzUepRmLKAZyySaHCfe0hNBGYFmt-YlPDP26mebjFHMt4Y0JDo5-cREiEcWGqBuDLhPrlAGhwFEjZ-J9FUNsSYJX-7lODjZ-ulZ26kHqEToziy1OGEtQi5j3mzNFyR2Maq_Z3kyW_p0l9WqvankB3K9QnYHDYgtZEAhKEgExgYp1vP_rhvOYM6rF70z0UtBqahFTgj8CtdkuIGRKSB5ccYxP-P-41nnPjoMQiJ6ntAjzmB_6U_X4hSwFFYQMC2H1J731sFDtKmbp-LigxtU_UxcGE0WWadtM9FoL8WiD5cy2HH3Lzxo64AH7BPJKrmPj3JQ4TzHXxM1QNs1INntJM6E8_E4uADevJxbTwH9RmkwThFbtHN6JA1C6jLEe72u8PF53UvyAqsOFTjeSS5FyurdIAgek__UQKwGWB0T-TjWpYfekuvj9I-qMvhWAyrEH4t5gko96G8-SraBgF8SMHOrxQ-rshz7)?**

**[If you donate $30 or more before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT, we’ll even send you a commemorative Keep New Hampshire Great t-shirt.](http://links.mowersforcongress.com/u/click?_t=40916cb2eb47469286d89e7d5b57adeb&_m=3b8633b806df4706a923b7ccc5053357&_e=DikXPvLL3rnF6BkMFWnDlRsascBMoaKe1OzUepRmLKAZyySaHCfe0hNBGYFmt-YlPDP26mebjFHMt4Y0JDo5-fhiz6Y69H2wOZAAOZHYKz06I5eVfKDdtkd-eAhRPaANMZfI7zGw9vYC8c0Xvj_oSbQoZGJ4MEV2catx9KC6jN62rXnQWLhN6lSaodIGaVvWzmJ5pSTmh_9G2Nehl5SY6JEt9BI-A4gcK1EiDQo7_VBdX2wVXbu_h8xBl7FIFGssQqCw3AEms2MZ8zBW2csy_LykDfDihVyDYblrrQv9HHn2rP19GSKYQtFHqIP8wcLT4RBPZZdUfUoNtgvXnVHRZp0qq58yoTE_cBs6RuLuZ_lzSvHNZjCliEvXi-C2J2I40YRAEpzY7kD9PV_fhzXEXBu6vrN1Q9a2NHjWJ8eEflpc1AtYIKWsLciniA8s2BYFhmby9H7MHG6SoGetvUyqdHT3bEAwS41xKQGqktN3yGDVK5DiJgh_ivvu10-HKz7G)**

clean_body: Here’s what you missed during President Trump’s rally on Friday. | | | Friend, I wanted to follow up with you in case you missed the rally on Friday. I wrote down some reflections about what President Trump said, and I thought I’d share them with you. | | America has been put to the test this year. From the pandemic to violent protests, our nation has faced crisis after crisis. But not even 2020 can break our American spirit. We can and will persevere through this difficult season. | | But the Left wants you to believe otherwise. Democrats are trying to convince the American people that we’ll only be able to weather this storm if we hand over all of our freedom and allow the government to make all of our decisions for us. Under no circumstances can we allow that to happen, friend. President Trump is right - America is the greatest country in the world, and it’s up to us to keep it that way. That means taking back the House and getting rid of as many radical Dems as possible in Congress. I’m on a mission to flip this District and send radical Democrat Chris Pappas packing in November, but I can’t do it alone. Can you help me flip NH-01 and kick another radical Democrat out of Washington by? | | Thank you for your support and for helping Keep New Hampshire Great. \- Matt | While Chris Pappas can count on Nancy Pelosi's deep pockets for funding, Matt Mowers is running a campaign funded by supporters like you. Will you chip in to help him fight back against the Left? | | | | | Paid for by Mowers for Congress | | P.O. Box 10297, Bedford, N.H. 03110 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

body:
Friends, This is really urgent... Our August end-of-month fundraising deadline is TODAY. We are almost two months away from the most important election in our lifetime, making it CRITICAL we crush our goal so we can fund our commercials and make sure our winning message reaches every voter throughout the LAST 64 DAYS.

| | Friends-

This is really urgent... Our August end-of-month fundraising deadline is TODAY.

We are almost two months away from the most important election in our lifetime, making it CRITICAL we crush our goal so we can fund our commercials and make sure our winning message reaches every voter throughout the LAST 64 DAYS.

[The truth is, if we don’t raise enough money to fund the last two months of our campaign, this election will be bought by the Pelosi Money Machine and dark money.](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=278A460A1A6032)

Dear Friend, Yesterday I told you we needed $3,129 to reach our August goal, and asked **[Can you help us get there with a quick donation?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18929937/244321211/-1907457920?refcode=RKC_083120_em_fr_all_eoq2_Line2&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjBhOTc0MC04OWViLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ug4kk2DYCXWG1vzdGxGiRUjBFLgd9ufX7XmSpiemSLM=)** You absolutely smashed it out of the ballpark - as I write this, we've exceeded our goal by $547! What do you do when you meet a goal ahead of schedule? You re-plan, determine how to best build on the momentum, and set a new goal. That's what the team and I have done, and we've set a new stretch-plus goal for the month, as well as increasing our goals for September and October. With another $2,453, we can hit that and keep on building momentum into September. I'll repeat what I said yesterday because it's incredibly important: it's critical that we succeed or we risk losing our representation in Washington to an ethically challenged outsider who was moved here like a pawn on a chess board by interests who are **UN** interested in the well-being of Central Texans or the health of our democracy. subject: Cresco: Team Biden-Harris Events Near You!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
64 Days until Election Day! |
---

Peter, The work we do leading up to Election Day will determine whether we win the battle for the soul of our nation. The only way we will defeat Donald Trump is by coming together as a country to organize and win. And we can't do this without you. [There's a lot of exciting things happening on the campaign, and we're not taking our foot off the gas. Will you commit to joining one of the virtual events in your community?](https://www.mobilize.us/2020victory/event/308770/?source=JB_EM_FIELD_2020.08.31_B10_weeklyorg_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FIELD_2020.08.31_B10_weeklyorg_X__F1_S1_C1__ac) | [](https://www.mobilize.us/2020victory/event/308770/?source=JB_EM_FIELD_2020.08.31_B10_weeklyorg_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FIELD_2020.08.31_B10_weeklyorg_X__F1_S1_C1__ac) | [**WHAT: **North Pocono, Dunmore and Moscow - Daily Phone Bank!
**WHEN:** Monday, August 31st, 2020
**TIME:** 1:00 pm EDT
**WHERE:** Online!](https://www.mobilize.us/2020victory/event/308770/?source=JB_EM_FIELD_2020.08.31_B10_weeklyorg_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FIELD_2020.08.31_B10_weeklyorg_X__F1_S1_C1__ac)
---
| [**RSVP now >>**](https://www.mobilize.us/2020victory/event/308770/?source=JB_EM_FIELD_2020.08.31_B10_weeklyorg_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FIELD_2020.08.31_B10_weeklyorg_X__F1_S1_C1__ac)

When we say our grassroots movement is powered by supporters like you, we really mean it, Peter.
Thanks for being in this fight!
Biden-Harris HQ

| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b0cf/1cd0ac28/154ac98e0/3570afb3/3667577309/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b0cf/1cd0ac28/154ac98e0/3570afb2/3667577309/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b0cf/1cd0ac28/154ac98e0/3570afb1/3667577309/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b0cf/1cd0ac28/154ac98e0/3570afb0/3667577309/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b0cf/1cd0ac28/154ac98e0/3570afaf/3667577309/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b0cf/1cd0ac28/154ac98e0/3570afae/3667577309/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b0cf/1cd0ac28/154ac98e0/3570afad/3667577309/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b0cf/1cd0ac28/154ac98e0/3570afac/3667577309/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden and Kamala Harris's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b0cf/1cd0ac28/154ac98e0/3570afab/3667577309/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE AND KAMALA »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b0cf/1cd0ac28/154ac98e0/3570afaa/3667577309/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b0cf/1cd0ac28/154ac98e0/3570afad/3667577309/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b0cf/1cd0ac28/154ac98e0/3570afa9/3667577309/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b0cf/1cd0ac28/154ac98e0/3570afac/3667577309/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b0cf/1cd0ac28/154ac98e0/3570afa8/3667577309/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

name: Team Hicks
subject: Folks were already struggling
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
body:
Things were tough for a lot of folks even before the pandemic. People working tirelessly everyday while still struggling just to put food on the table, gas in their trucks, or pay their health insurance premiums. We don’t have to take this. Our race is neck and neck, and it’s because of grassroots online donors, chipping in $15, $20, or whatever they can.

|

name: Mary Mancini
subject: this far
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Peter,
We have just $2,240 left to raise in order to reach our August goal. We’re close but not there yet. Please consider making a donation right now and nudging us over the finish line. In a race this important, every penny matters. And we only have until midnight.
A year ago today I don’t think any of us could have imagined being in the place we’re in right now as a nation. A global pandemic has taken over 182,000 American lives, and left millions more in economic peril, and President Trump's only answer is ‘it could be much worse.’ And as peaceful protestors fight for justice and stand up to systemic racism, President Trump calls them domestic terrorists and uses our military against them.
This is where we are right now, but it's not too late to take back the soul of America. Electing steady and effective leaders is the way out, and we get that opportunity this November. That’s why we need to make sure Democrats show up like never before in this election. That’s why we need to win.
So again, please consider making a donation right now. This is the time for Democrats to stand up. We’re all in this together. [http://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Thank you,

--
Mary Mancini
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: September Surprise
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=september_surprise&n=1)
---
Peter \-- **It's the last day of August, otherwise known as Day 171 of Governor Walz' "Emergency". Surprise! Politicians aren't done killing our businesses and eradicating our civil liberties.** Now the real pain is going to set in. Restaurants that adapted to the government orders by serving patrons outside, are going to suffer as the weather starts cooling down. We just learned a popular restaurant in Rep Rob Ecklund's district is the most recent victim of Walz' shutdown aftermath. Another permanent closure. Schools are starting up again...kind of. Parents are about to feel the strain of the hybrid model where kids go to school only a couple days a week, while they have to scramble to find child care the other days. A small spike in COVID cases and those schools will go right back to the ineffective distance learning model. **To this day, we are still being ordered by Walz to not have mass gatherings. Celebrations like the Minnesota State Fair, Oktoberfest and other large gatherings have been canceled this fall. Meanwhile, Walz and Democrat leadership praise the lawless rioting & looting, I mean "protesting", of BLM/Antifa.** Challenge Walz' illegal orders and you are likely to find yourself in court or paying large fines. Tyrant-in-Making Walz went after Kris Schiffler back in May for opening his restaurant early. In July, he went after the North Star Stampede rodeo. And we learned this past week that the Walz' administration will be ramping up compliance checks throughout the state. Is this the Minnesota you want to live in? Action 4 Liberty has vowed to continue the fight against Walz by passing the resolution to strip him of his emergency powers. Our next battle is coming up in the September Special Session. We still need 5 Democrats to flip their vote and now is when we make them feel the pain, instead of us. **We're taking our message directly to voters in their districts so they know exactly how they are killing businesses and trampling on our civil liberties. As politicians like Brad Tabke are campaigning, we'll be there telling voters in 55A how Brad puts Walz ahead of them!** [](http://www.action4liberty.com/end_walz_tabke_commercial?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=september_surprise&n=2) Walz is abusing his emergency powers and politicians like Brad Tabke are protecting him. **Equip us with the resources to alert voters in Brad Tabke's district from now until election day that Tabke is killing small business and infringing on our liberties by protecting Tim Walz.**
## [EQUIP ACTION 4 LIBERTY](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=september_surprise&n=3)
The Legislature will be back in session soon and we can't afford to not put**maximum pressure** on Tabke and the other four Democrats needed to End Walz' Emergency Powers. Help us get these commercials out to tens of thousands of voters this election season by donating today. | [](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=september_surprise&n=4 "DONATE") [DONATE](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=september_surprise&n=5)
---
We must **turn up the heat** on Brad Tabke and these other Democrats to stop protecting Walz! Let’s have them feel the political pain, instead of our beloved businesses.
When politicians see their friends like Brad Tabke get kicked to the curb in an election, it sends a strong message to their friends to not cross us. We need to send a very loud message this election season that there will be a heavy price to pay for trampling on our liberties and shuttering our businesses!
[**Only with your support of funding these commercials, other cutting edge digitals, mail and all your activism can we make this a reality. Pitch in $100 NOW if you can. If that's too much, help us out with $50 or $25. Or get us a lot of air play with a generous donation of $1,000.**](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=september_surprise&n=6)
**In Liberty,

**
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=september_surprise&n=7).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=september_surprise&n=8).
Created with [NationBuilder](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=september_surprise&n=9), software for leaders.

body:

| **This is how much time we have left before we reach our fundraising deadline and have to budget for the last two months of our election cycle.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18936578/244411409/-2141433825?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.31_b1_ATS_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzcyYjYwOC1hNGViLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ml72pvzaNu1e7Z0CLI32Yksigt9mjh32ooXLfKpYBS8=)

**And _this_ is how much we have to raise before the timer runs out.**

**$3,767** In campaign time, two months is a blink of an eye. Every day, new things come up, more things need to be prepared for, and more voters need to be reached out to.

The next few hours are going to determine the next 64 days. Meeting our fundraising deadline and accomplishing our goal will inform how we’re able to conduct our outreach initiatives for the remaining days of this campaign -- _and friend, that is going to affect the outcome of this race._

[**We need you in this fight, friend \-- and we need you to power us through Election Day and all the way to Congress. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18936579/244411456/-2141433825?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.31_b1_ATS_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzcyYjYwOC1hNGViLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ml72pvzaNu1e7Z0CLI32Yksigt9mjh32ooXLfKpYBS8=)

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: 🕐 24 hours
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
I need you now, friend!! |
---
Friend,

When I wrote yesterday, we were behind our end-of-month goal.

I was very candid about the risks of falling behind at a crucial moment like this.

And the outpouring of support over the last 24 hours has been amazing.

_But we 're not quite there._ We're _so close_ to hitting our $100,000 fundraising goal. But we need a BIG DAY TODAY to reach it.

_My staff just briefed me that we 're well over halfway there -- but the clock is ticking, and Mitch McConnell's super PAC is pouring more money in against me than any other Democratic Senate candidate in the country._

**[Here's the deal, friend: We're just shy of $40,000 short. Time is of the essence. Right now, can you rush a donation before tonight's midnight deadline?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2491/5b2c1286/380d62a9/25f0c44f/1722999772/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_31_eom_jo_am?refcode=em_2020_08_31_eom_jo_am")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

---
Friend, we knew this goal was ambitious when we set it, but I have complete faith this team will get us over the top.

While my opponent is relying on corporate donors, pay-to-play fundraisers, and Mitch McConnell's super PAC, **my campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you, and hundreds of thousands across the country.**

But it's going to take a small-dollar army to complete with Perdue's dirty money machine.

Mitch McConnell knows how close this race is. I'm neck and neck in the polls with David Perdue as experts continue to upgrade the race in my direction.

**McConnell, Perdue, and the GOP are doing everything they can to stop me and save their Senate majority.**

We've got them on the ropes, friend.

**[Will you rush a donation before midnight to keep our momentum going?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2491/5b2c1286/380d62a9/25f0c44f/1722999772/VEsB/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_31_eom_jo_am?refcode=em_2020_08_31_eom_jo_am")**

name: Sandy Smith
subject: Mobs Attack Senators in Joe Biden's America
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gEd7GBllt3Nxmng&b=61B23F98hSFthmCPgH1OGQ)
---

Dear Peter,

**I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district. I am tired of the Biden riots and the violence caused by the Democrats' overheated rhetoric attacking anyone they disagree with!**

Did you catch the Republican Convention last week? It was fantastic- a real week-long celebration of being an American.
As this was happening, the Democrats were conducting violent riots in Portland and Kenosha, completely without consequence from local liberal Mayors who have allowed the destruction and murder.
On Thursday, they brought that destruction and rioting and violence to Washington, another city with a crazy liberal mayor. And the rioters took advantage of it by attacking peaceful Republicans coming out of the White House.
_**One of these was Senator Rand Paul, who gave his account of the assault later:**_
_In his speech to the Republican National Convention Thursday night, President Trump said if you want the rest of the country to look like Portland, Ore., put the Democrats fully in charge and that’s what you’ll get._
_That’s hard to argue with considering what we are seeing in many of our cities, where well-intentioned protest marches long ago were hijacked into lawless and violent destructive anarchy, often led by outside agitators and violent Marxists._
_I experienced some of this in Washington after the president’s speech.

My wife Kelley and I were attempting to leave the White House event. We were staying at a hotel directly across the street, maybe 50 yards from the gates of the White House. But as we went to leave, it became apparent there was no safe exit out the gates and through the unruly mob that had gathered there._
_Why? Because another Democratic-run city had decided it would bow to lawless rioters instead of protecting its citizens. Mayor Muriel Bowser was asked by the Secret Service to allow wider and better protection for those leaving the White House Thursday night, but she refused._

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gEd7GBllt3Nxmng&b=61B23F98hSFthmCPgH1OGQ)
---

_For the record, Senator Paul has now been attacked three times by crazed liberals, one of which required several surgeries and the removal of part of his lung._

**He has suffered much for doing the right thing, including the "Justice for Breanna Taylor" Act. The crowd, ignorant of this, was actually demanding for Rand to say her name- or else they would harm him.**

**_This is Joe Biden's America. These people aren't Republicans. These rioters HATE Republicans- just like Biden, Pelosi, Butterfield and all the Democrats do. _**

You cannot govern a nation you hate, and yet, that's what Biden's Democrats are trying to do.

_THAT is why we must win. THAT is why we need to push hard here!_

**If we do not defeat the Democrats this year, all of us- freedom-loving Americans and conservatives- will be cancelled. Persecuted. **

[If you agree with me, I need your help to beat Pelosi's deputy whip Butterfield!](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gEd7GBllt3Nxmng&b=61B23F98hSFthmCPgH1OGQ) Unlike Pelosi, unlike Butterfield, I will love America and help Americans!

[Can you help me take this swing district back](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gEd7GBllt3Nxmng&b=61B23F98hSFthmCPgH1OGQ), with your best and immediate contribution of $15, $35, or $250? Taking out my opponent, one of Pelosi’s leading lieutenants, would be a crippling blow to the Democrat Socialists and to Nancy Pelosi’s agenda.

G.K. Butterfield is awful, but to replace him I [really need your help](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gEd7GBllt3Nxmng&b=61B23F98hSFthmCPgH1OGQ). Our country needs us NOW! Let's stand up now, before it's too late!

For God and Country,
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gEd7GBllt3Nxmng&b=61B23F98hSFthmCPgH1OGQ)
---
Sandy Smith
Republican for Congress, North Carolina's new First District
Conservative
Entrepreneur & Military mom
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gEd7GBllt3Nxmng&b=61B23F98hSFthmCPgH1OGQ)
---
P.S. [Will you contribute $15, $60, $250, or your largest contribution?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gEd7GBllt3Nxmng&b=61B23F98hSFthmCPgH1OGQ) I need to reach my goal to catch up with Butterfield.

PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC

P.O. Box 434
Winterville NC 28590
USA

[Unsubscribe](https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?rMyMrEwcrLQcbIyMTGxMzLRGtCzszJyMrBwc) | [Change Subscriber Options](https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?rMyMrEwcrLQcbIyMTGxMzLRGtCzszJyMrBwc)

name: Margaret Good
subject: check out our first television ad!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18937523/244430091/-940294256?refcode=083120-es-tv-ad-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjM4NjNlYi1hOGViLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nnaxpydX7shMvovILVFm_6d4BS31149YpkF3NasgvfI=&emci=58570eaf-a8eb-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=d23863eb-a8eb-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=9814644)

I want you to be among the first to know about our first television ad! I hope you have a moment to watch about why I’m running for office.
Friend,

I want you to be among the first to know about our first television ad! I hope you have a moment to watch about why I’m running for office.

When you are raised by a pastor and a nurse, and your family has a history of service, you learn to fix problems — not complain about them.

**Right now Congress is at a standstill, because they are more concerned with politics than getting things done. I’ll work with anyone who’s ready to get results for the people of Florida and our nation.**

**[Click here to watch our new television ad, funded by the people — not corporate PACs.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18937525/244430093/-218107030?refcode2=d23863eb-a8eb-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emci=58570eaf-a8eb-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=d23863eb-a8eb-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&refcode=083120-es-tv-ad-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjM4NjNlYi1hOGViLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nnaxpydX7shMvovILVFm_6d4BS31149YpkF3NasgvfI=)**

name: Vote-by-Mail Alert
subject: re: Stacey Abrams' message for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
Our fundamental right to vote is under attack at the worst possible moment, friend.
With fewer than 70 days to go until the most consequential election of our lifetimes, Republicans across the country are doing everything they can to SUPPRESS the vote - including _blocking_ vote-by-mail during this pandemic.

Stacey Abrams knows the stakes of this fight: With all the GOP-led voter suppression in 2018, she fell just under _55,000_ votes short of winning her historic race to become Georgia's next governor. **That's why Stacey is calling on Democrats like you to defend our right to vote before it's too late:**
[](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://surveys.signforgood.com/warnock-vbm-abrams?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk564-su-nd")
Everything from health care to the future of the Supreme Court is on the ballot this year, and we can't afford to sit on the sidelines. We need to fight back and ensure every American can make their voice heard in our democracy.
**Already, thousands of grassroots Democrats across the country have answered Stacey Abrams' urgent call to action, but we're still missing 57 responses from Georgia - including yours, friend. Please, tell us right now:**
| | **Will you stand with Stacey Abrams to demand universal vote-by-mail?**

name: Mike Huckabee
subject: Today’s goal for 20112
body:
Peter, I’ll make this short and sweet.
Since last week when I announced our 5X matching donation offer for August, we’ve seen an absolute explosion of generosity and excitement.
It gives me great hope for November.
**That said, we’re still shy of our August goals and the My Faith Votes fundraising team is looking to find another 8 donors in 20112 before midnight.**
**[Knowing it will have 5x the power, will you help with an urgent donation now?](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200831apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200831apl01nd&n=1)**
I know I’ve asked a lot, but it’s crunch time. When it comes to voter turnout, resources matter. This is bigger than the White House -- there are 100,000 elections across America in November.
**[Your help today, before September, would be incredibly helpful and much appreciated.](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200831apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200831apl01nd&n=2)**
[](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200831apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200831apl01nd&n=3)
Thank you for everything you’re doing.
Sincerely,
Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200831apl01nd&n=4)
©2020 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker Rd, #640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).

Peter,

The liberal mob is growing more violent. It started in Minneapolis when the Democrat mayor let a police precinct burn. Then, in New York City, the Democrat mayor let Manhattan get ransacked by violent looters. In Chicago, the Democrat mayor refused President Trump's offer to help--and the city was looted clean. [**Raised:**](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=aec3eb443b&e=e25784ff28) | [**Goal:**](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=6ca21160de&e=e25784ff28) | [**Difference:**](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=f7d229a0c0&e=e25784ff28)
[$2,993](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=aa54ea6f39&e=e25784ff28) | [$4,047](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=3be6383d30&e=e25784ff28) | **[-$1,054](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=13ffc61696&e=e25784ff28)**

Meeting this goal is critical to getting Dana’s message out across the district. And to be honest, we’ve still got some ground to make up so we can make that happen.

Connecting with voters, distributing yard signs, and running digital ads takes resources – and unlike Barry Loudermilk and his deep-pocketed donors, we’re relying on the support of grassroots folks like you. [**If you are able, please make a donation to make sure our campaign can keep firing on all cylinders until Election Day.**](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=275e5457e0&e=e25784ff28)

name: Team Mowers
subject: Here’s what we know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mowers for Congress |
body:
If Friday’s rally taught us anything, it’s that Granite Staters are sick and tired of Nancy Pelosi and Chris Pappas. | |
---
[ ](http://links.mowersforcongress.com/u/click?_t=40916cb2eb47469286d89e7d5b57adeb&_m=a8606eed67b04bbfa1221a85fa801f51&_e=mLesAhEw4J0t-q2cEDtwj9gNg32bvDEK8SxcYzcp_Y0VjvSAFVG4vYsaOHtJ2Ef8TQBdENiTooVIu5mGukouGiEsiU4ju-G3i7_k1gLwn9tzV7fIxOVBUfbHoptwMgoZMJ0XuMe2k3O8ASK6_gbN7e74jh9sNm5c_75a0ipxqCVhbCkmJRio08Ycu3JB69QYh6vDUmV-oN5EEgpL5D-VXgPmFOCFwANhH0zQ19GK_KSY2wxtQFtpvR1c6P1yh8RXaoaZephLfc0Uk-bmw8mA9SAwD5PNBGNR9r8KQMteaZf-QHy3GZRzDz1CSRG-Ii8_cnQofBxQ6VwKvnKTzaSuvdj8ggCqz0rb51BzSoVdBgLhOpEmb-N86IJIsJ_v1-_M1RRB0Su1yYy2F-YwiUNN-_mlwsc9F4UMEujVUzbxTTVCpwkiNmruynEjY9OgOjPOKU0bcKp9ymppWCHStCOF0iwfTsmnF2NrXaAIq_jtWgJjoaLMK9F5a52aDqEBnTpk)
|
---
Friend,

Washington Democrats have turned their backs on everyday Americans to advance their own radical agenda. **That includes New Hampshire’s very own Chris Pappas.**
|
---
[**TAKE A STAND AGAINST CHRIS PAPPAS**](http://links.mowersforcongress.com/u/click?_t=40916cb2eb47469286d89e7d5b57adeb&_m=a8606eed67b04bbfa1221a85fa801f51&_e=mLesAhEw4J0t-q2cEDtwj9gNg32bvDEK8SxcYzcp_Y0VjvSAFVG4vYsaOHtJ2Ef8TQBdENiTooVIu5mGukouGiEsiU4ju-G3i7_k1gLwn9tzV7fIxOVBUfbHoptwMgoZMJ0XuMe2k3O8ASK6_gbN7e74jh9sNm5c_75a0ipxqCVhbCkmJRio08Ycu3JB69QYh6vDUmV-oN5EEgpL5D-VXgPmFOCFwANhH0zQ19GK_KSY2wxtQFtpvR1c6P1yh8RXaoaZephLfc0Uk-bmw8mA9SAwD5PNBGNR9r8KQMteaZcJcK2deWL74_Aj9q6T7xdrkMklwQjBnSJ59AEv2OAs4UdiDALPgECcFMK7Q1k0ia_AEAaYtAumno0DMiKQVPOwQqHbrX3947PETD8Ahl0myif5yWnOCLSYemEhLVE0XeTzBcfKPf7qG94p30g7Cg1rbW-1yC7Jfn-qOfsskRcR8AhRT0pUk_E1EqDSyaOs75eE5M_o0oCLhyK5wEUKSJ4Z)
|
---
Granite Staters are sick and tired of it - that’s why there was a record turnout at President Trump’s rally on Friday. Folks in New Hampshire know that President Trump will do everything he can to get us back on our feet after everything that’s happened in 2020.

But here’s the catch: _He can’t do it alone._

President Trump is going to need an army of conservative fighters in Congress to push back against radical liberals and help him get things done. He hand-picked Matt Mowers to lead the charge, and now the President is counting on _YOU_ to get Mowers to Washington.
|
---
[**GET MOWERS TO WASHINGTON**](http://links.mowersforcongress.com/u/click?_t=40916cb2eb47469286d89e7d5b57adeb&_m=a8606eed67b04bbfa1221a85fa801f51&_e=mLesAhEw4J0t-q2cEDtwj9gNg32bvDEK8SxcYzcp_Y0VjvSAFVG4vYsaOHtJ2Ef8TQBdENiTooVIu5mGukouGiEsiU4ju-G3i7_k1gLwn9tzV7fIxOVBUfbHoptwMgoZMJ0XuMe2k3O8ASK6_gbN7e74jh9sNm5c_75a0ipxqCVhbCkmJRio08Ycu3JB69QYh6vDUmV-oN5EEgpL5D-VXgPmFOCFwANhH0zQ19GK_KSY2wxtQFtpvR1c6P1yh8RXaoaZephLfc0Uk-bmw8mA9SAwD5PNBGNR9r8KQMteaZfaVP8t9x0b1qRkGqsi3ZwTHLD0ZHYGDg4TfGoC_hQUVUP-XEB265iVx8csRNH1TtsfwEgUhEo_o3FF89ndO7KS0DiE4Qtrj0ZUs8CjRYqNfhBusquCYoTx1ysqSdF6YegjQ_vqh_Kk_ZBMF5WQWIh8RqMS3swn_8fc7w8cz3Dc2vv5wJR32oUOJkyCehcmwDQ4uPrh_0TqCxyrvMO4zp7F)
|
---
**Today is the FEC’s end of month deadline, and every dollar we raise puts Mowers one step closer.** Chris Pappas may have donors with deep pockets, but we have something even better - grassroots support from every corner of the Granite State.

Over the course of this incredible campaign, we’ve heard stories from all over our district of families needing the kind of leadership Sri will deliver. This is who our campaign is meant for, friend -- and leaders all over the country are recognizing just what this movement can accomplish.

It’s made our historically safe-Republican district a toss-up. It has proven that the voters in this district are sick of political games, demanding accountability from an opponent who politicized the coronavirus, calling common sense safety measures “unAmerican” and refusing to enforce laws that are meant to keep us safe.

**And, most importantly, it has put the issues our families care about at the forefront.**

With you by our side, we can finally deliver on these issues and make progress on health care and our economy -- _but first, we have to win this election._

**We have two months left until Election Day, and only a few hours left before a critical fundraising deadline that will shape how we campaign for the next two months.**

This is who our campaign is meant for, friend -- and leaders all over the country are recognizing just what this movement can accomplish. It’s made our historically safe-Republican district a toss-up. It has proven that the voters in this district are sick of political games, demanding accountability from an opponent who politicized the coronavirus, calling common sense safety measures “unAmerican” and refusing to enforce laws that are meant to keep us safe. body:
It’s your last chance to take advantage of our double-matching before our deadline! Read more >>

Friend,

I just got word from our team: as we head into the final day of our big end-of-month fundraising push, we’re now just $6,923 away from reaching our goal! We are so close!

With Vote by Mail ballots arriving in voters’ mailboxes soon, we don’t have a moment to waste.

**We need to get television ads on the air, send out mail, and get our digital ads up and running before voters begin casting their ballots and time is running out.**

**[Can you pitch in before midnight tonight to push us over the finish line and ensure we reach our end-of-month fundraising goal? Margaret Good for Congress
PO Box 5073
Sarasota, FL 34277
United States
Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us.
Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, and we are excited to have your support! You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support—that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. Our campaign has taken a pledge to reject corporate PAC money and is instead funded by thousands of actual people who care about our democracy and want to see positive change in our community and across our country. **[If you'd like to donate, click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18942675/244513664/788213855?refcode=emfooter&amount=25&recurring=1&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGMxNTNlMi1jNWViLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mW-L4NnZrTRaOuTwjxNbbSWiY9k4PIEjM7u75vxKViY=)**
If you’d like to volunteer, **[click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18942676/244513665/-1805212762?refcode=083120-es-eom-fr-5-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGMxNTNlMi1jNWViLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mW-L4NnZrTRaOuTwjxNbbSWiY9k4PIEjM7u75vxKViY=&emci=26afa0a1-c5eb-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=00c153e2-c5eb-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=9814644)**

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Fight the quarantining of healthy people, HCQ testimonials & more – Week of August 31st Action Items
body:
| |
---
This week’s action items include fighting against outlandish quarantining procedures for healthy people, sharing testimonial videos from people who used HCQ and survived COVID, using an updated school reopening resource PDF that highlights quotes and information for you, sharing videos from the GOP Convention, sharing new information about forced indoctrination at the federal level. And, as always, we have a new civics lesson – this week it’s about the real history of the Republican Party and civil rights!

_Note: in order to share the links below, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it._
|
---
**Fight Against the Quarantining of Healthy People & the Re-Closing of Schools**
It’s happening across the country, where departments of health and elected officials are using some awful CDC guidelines that results in the quarantining of hundreds of healthy kids if a few COVID cases pop up at school. Once this happens, schools shut down – again – and it goes against the actual science of COVID spread and asymptomatic cases. It also contradicts [the CDC’s other guidelines](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjQ0LWY5N2RlZDVjNzIyZTRkMWNiMjJlMWQ3ZjVhNjUyZDlj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9yYXRpb25hbGdyb3VuZC5jb20vbmV3LWNkYy1ndWlkZWxpbmVzLWFyZS1hbGlnbmVkLXdpdGgtc2NpZW5jZS8_bWlkPTQyNjAxJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=TPXgon1S3SLvcaJiyC6F2w) that assert asymptomatic people don’t even need to be tested – even if they’ve been around a COVID-positive person!

[We have a sample letter that you can customize and use](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjQ0LWY5N2RlZDVjNzIyZTRkMWNiMjJlMWQ3ZjVhNjUyZDlj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vZG9jdW1lbnRzL0dvdmVybm9yLUtlbXAtYW5kLURyLVRvb21leS1mcm9tLWNpdGl6ZW5zLmRvY3g_bWlkPTQyNjAxJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=xenAK0Ci4ysF8MZ7vcwSGQ) that was sent to the Governor of Georgia, providing solid arguments and evidence about why they must change the quarantining guidelines that schools are following. Even if your schools haven’t shut down again, you need to find out what their plan is if/when COVID cases occur in school. Your schools may be following these same guidelines, but you don’t know it yet. Stop it before it starts. The resource pdf in the next section breaks out the links and quotes used in the letter.
1. Call or email your school board, your Governor, and your Dept. of Health, and ask what their quarantining procedures are, and which guidance they are using.
2. If they are using the erroneous CDC guidelines that require healthy kids to be quarantined, customize and send the letter we created.
3. Be on the lookout for more action items on this next week as well.

|
---
**Watch and Share COVID Survival Testimonials – People Who Used HCQ**
Watch and share these Hydroxychloroquine testimonial videos from people who survived COVID because of HCQ.
* [Matt Rich’s story](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjQ0LWY5N2RlZDVjNzIyZTRkMWNiMjJlMWQ3ZjVhNjUyZDlj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g_dj1lMEtkLWQ0bE9KQSZtaWQ9NDI2MDEmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=CDBzSM0GQlNfwf1Fw6tnnA)
* [Paul Luman’s story](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjQ0LWY5N2RlZDVjNzIyZTRkMWNiMjJlMWQ3ZjVhNjUyZDlj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g_dj1OXzZZMW13TlgzdyZtaWQ9NDI2MDEmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=OnRUmEV2T4Se8DfAF-m-OA)

|
---
***UPDATED* School Reopening Resources to Read, Share, and Use**
[We updated the School Reopening Resources PDF](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjQ0LWY5N2RlZDVjNzIyZTRkMWNiMjJlMWQ3ZjVhNjUyZDlj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vZG9jdW1lbnRzL1Jlc291cmNlcy1QYXJlbnRzLVJlb3BlbmluZy1TY2hvb2xzLnBkZj9taWQ9NDI2MDEmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=VrjrdAl-5exDn7FUanejbg) to include the quotes and parts that are noteworthy, that you can take to your school boards and other officials in your attempt to reopen schools or keep them open. This way, you have the pertinent information at your fingertips, as well as the link with the full information to back it up.

[We also have a second PDF](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjQ0LWY5N2RlZDVjNzIyZTRkMWNiMjJlMWQ3ZjVhNjUyZDlj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vZG9jdW1lbnRzL1NjaG9vbC1SZW9wZW5pbmctRG9jdG9yLVZpZGVvLUxpbmtzLWFuZC1RdW90ZXMucGRmP21pZD00MjYwMSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=gpCp8rZCQwf7vDGMYN9DtA) that contains links to video interviews with doctors, and their relevant quotes about reopening schools.
|
---
**Share Videos and Speeches from the Republican National Convention**
At _[The Federalist](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjQ0LWY5N2RlZDVjNzIyZTRkMWNiMjJlMWQ3ZjVhNjUyZDlj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90aGVmZWRlcmFsaXN0LmNvbS8yMDIwLzA4LzI3LzYtcXVpY2stdGFrZWF3YXlzLWZyb20tdGhpcmQtbmlnaHQtb2YtcmVwdWJsaWNhbi1uYXRpb25hbC1jb252ZW50aW9uLz9taWQ9NDI2MDEmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=juJorccscA6JlU2TuHrRaA)_ , Mollie Hemingway wrote (emphasis added), “Because of the media being so hysterically anti-Trump, **this convention is the first time in about four years that non-leftist Americans have seen other Americans reflecting their positive views about President Trump.”**

She is exactly right. And the lies the media is telling about the convention itself are astounding. So, it’s imperative that we all share the speeches and messages from the RNC, and particularly, [we need to share President Trump’s speech](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjQ0LWY5N2RlZDVjNzIyZTRkMWNiMjJlMWQ3ZjVhNjUyZDlj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g_dj1SaEw5aUZrQmF1cyZtaWQ9NDI2MDEmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=As5LxRz-4fe0ULv6-NPaLQ). Below are the links to all four full nights of the convention. You can share those links, or you can also go to [the Team Trump Twitter feed](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjQ0LWY5N2RlZDVjNzIyZTRkMWNiMjJlMWQ3ZjVhNjUyZDlj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9UZWFtVHJ1bXA_bWlkPTQyNjAxJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=rIT5asP-KL4tsTGQ3gn2LQ) and scroll through to pick out the individual speeches and videos that you’d like to share.
_**To Share Links: When you find a video of an individual speech that you want to share on social media or over email, simply open that tweet and copy the link from the URL address bar, and paste wherever you are sharing it.**_

[Night 1: Land of Promise](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjQ0LWY5N2RlZDVjNzIyZTRkMWNiMjJlMWQ3ZjVhNjUyZDlj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g_dj1WOFY3Q3NYSXdVcyZtaWQ9NDI2MDEmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=nKuXnRyPec4Wp8OidGrvOA)
[Night 2: Land of Opportunity](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjQ0LWY5N2RlZDVjNzIyZTRkMWNiMjJlMWQ3ZjVhNjUyZDlj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g_dj1hZGVQMkdQNWlvOCZtaWQ9NDI2MDEmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=C9xQCt4iERHWyICF97TmwQ)
[Night 3: Land of Heroes](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjQ0LWY5N2RlZDVjNzIyZTRkMWNiMjJlMWQ3ZjVhNjUyZDlj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTE%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g_dj1NQVQxR3NsRDZVSSZtaWQ9NDI2MDEmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=AnLYH0qBgx10hy-R76CTiw)
[Night 4: Land of Greatness](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjQ0LWY5N2RlZDVjNzIyZTRkMWNiMjJlMWQ3ZjVhNjUyZDlj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTI%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g_dj1jWEMtLXV5STJNdyZtaWQ9NDI2MDEmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=o4x1ICZQ83EUWwEgwqxyFA)
|
---
***New* Information about Sandia National Laboratory to Read and Share
**
Christopher Rufo, of the Discovery Institute and the Heritage Foundation, has updated information about the abuse and forced racist indoctrination at one of our country’s most prestigious nuclear research labs. Read his Twitter thread with the new information (retweet if you have a Twitter account, and just read it if you don’t). He has also written about these matters at his website, [ChristopherRufo.com](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjQ0LWY5N2RlZDVjNzIyZTRkMWNiMjJlMWQ3ZjVhNjUyZDlj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTM%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9jaHJpc3RvcGhlcnJ1Zm8uY29tLz9taWQ9NDI2MDEmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=WHKjAS_zBmYT098an_4sDA).

[There is a civil war erupting at Sandia Labs.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjQ0LWY5N2RlZDVjNzIyZTRkMWNiMjJlMWQ3ZjVhNjUyZDlj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9yZWFsY2hyaXNydWZvL3N0YXR1cy8xMjk5MDA4NzUwNzI5MDk3MjE2P21pZD00MjYwMSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=S-yZo2d9NXhY-wwWr79trw)
|
---
**Make Real Civics Education a Priority Again
Week of August 31st
**
Keep an eye out every week for a new activity or book or lesson to bring real civics back to our children. ([Download this week’s lesson as a PDF.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjQ0LWY5N2RlZDVjNzIyZTRkMWNiMjJlMWQ3ZjVhNjUyZDlj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTU%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vZG9jdW1lbnRzL0Npdmljcy1MZXNzb24tV2Vlay1vZi1BdWctMzEucGRmP21pZD00MjYwMSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=lHCR8c_lX5H_Gv_deBFjSA))

**This week, we will study the real history of the Republican Party and civil rights.**
The media and the left love to portray the Republican Party as racist. They lie about history, as well as the current beliefs and positions of Republicans and conservatives more generally. However, the real history of America tells the truth, and we must ensure that young people know the truth so that they are not manipulated into losing the freedoms we all hold dear in America. After this week’s lesson, we will use the themes highlighted in each of the nights of the Republican National Convention to dive deeper into the history and civics of America, and the founding ideals that liberate and protect all Americans, no matter their race.

**[Civil Rights History Summation from the National Black Republican Association](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjQ0LWY5N2RlZDVjNzIyZTRkMWNiMjJlMWQ3ZjVhNjUyZDlj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTY%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9ibGFja3JlcHVibGljYW4uYmxvZ3Nwb3QuY29tL3AvaGlzdG9yeS1vZi1jaXZpbC1yaWdodHMtaW4tbnV0c2hlbGwuaHRtbD9taWQ9NDI2MDEmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=JI5H30vFK_ROMWdi0PsJ_g)** – This blog post stretches from the founding of the Republican Party to the present and is full of details and historical facts that every American should know. Take your time to read through it and discuss as a family!

**[The Inconvenient Truth About the Republican Party](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjQ0LWY5N2RlZDVjNzIyZTRkMWNiMjJlMWQ3ZjVhNjUyZDlj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTc%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucHJhZ2VydS5jb20vdmlkZW8vdGhlLWluY29udmVuaWVudC10cnV0aC1hYm91dC10aGUtcmVwdWJsaWNhbi1wYXJ0eS8_bWlkPTQyNjAxJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=CEHgukYJbwRlWjE4tZwzLQ)** – PragerU video, description: “When you think of the Republican Party, what comes to mind? If you’re like many Americans, you may associate the GOP with racism, sexism, and general inequality. It’s a commonly pushed narrative by left-leaning media and academia, but as former Vanderbilt Professor of Political Science Carol Swain explains, the Republican Party was actually responsible for nearly every advancement for minorities and women in U.S. history—and remains the champion of equality to this day.”

**Discussion Questions**
* Ask your children to summarize, in their own words, the history of the Republican Party and black Americans. You’re not looking for exact dates here. You are looking for an understanding of how this history unfolded and major themes.
* Why would people today lie about this history – what could motivate them to hide the truth?
* Is it good for America and Americans of all races to know the truth of our history? Why? How could knowing the truth help to bring peace back to our cities that are currently under attack by rioters?

In liberty,

Jenny Beth Martin
[CONTRIBUTE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjQ0LWY5N2RlZDVjNzIyZTRkMWNiMjJlMWQ3ZjVhNjUyZDlj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90c2FjdGlvbi5vcmcvZG9uYXRlLz9taWQ9NDI2MDEmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=mRFJGyPpyBoo5GHX6T3Y6A)
|
---

clean_body: | | This week’s action items include fighting against outlandish quarantining procedures for healthy people, sharing testimonial videos from people who used HCQ and survived COVID, using an updated school reopening resource PDF that highlights quotes and information for you, sharing videos from the GOP Convention, sharing new information about forced indoctrination at the federal level. And, as always, we have a new civics lesson – this week it’s about the real history of the Republican Party and civil rights! Note: in order to share the links below, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it. | Fight Against the Quarantining of Healthy People & the Re-Closing of Schools It’s happening across the country, where departments of health and elected officials are using some awful CDC guidelines that results in the quarantining of hundreds of healthy kids if a few COVID cases pop up at school. Once this happens, schools shut down – again – and it goes against the actual science of COVID spread and asymptomatic cases. It also contradicts that assert asymptomatic people don’t even need to be tested – even if they’ve been around a COVID-positive person! that was sent to the Governor of Georgia, providing solid arguments and evidence about why they must change the quarantining guidelines that schools are following. Even if your schools haven’t shut down again, you need to find out what their plan is if/when COVID cases occur in school. Your schools may be following these same guidelines, but you don’t know it yet. Stop it before it starts. The resource pdf in the next section breaks out the links and quotes used in the letter. 1. Call or email your school board, your Governor, and your Dept. of Health, and ask what their quarantining procedures are, and which guidance they are using. 2. If they are using the erroneous CDC guidelines that require healthy kids to be quarantined, customize and send the letter we created. 3. Be on the lookout for more action items on this next week as well. | Watch and Share COVID Survival Testimonials – People Who Used HCQ Watch and share these Hydroxychloroquine testimonial videos from people who survived COVID because of HCQ. | *UPDATED School Reopening Resources to Read, Share, and Use to include the quotes and parts that are noteworthy, that you can take to your school boards and other officials in your attempt to reopen schools or keep them open. This way, you have the pertinent information at your fingertips, as well as the link with the full information to back it up. that contains links to video interviews with doctors, and their relevant quotes about reopening schools. | Share Videos and Speeches from the Republican National Convention At , Mollie Hemingway wrote (emphasis added), “Because of the media being so hysterically anti-Trump, this convention is the first time in about four years that non-leftist Americans have seen other Americans reflecting their positive views about President Trump.” She is exactly right. And the lies the media is telling about the convention itself are astounding. So, it’s imperative that we all share the speeches and messages from the RNC, and particularly, . Below are the links to all four full nights of the convention. You can share those links, or you can also go to and scroll through to pick out the individual speeches and videos that you’d like to share. To Share Links: When you find a video of an individual speech that you want to share on social media or over email, simply open that tweet and copy the link from the URL address bar, and paste wherever you are sharing it. | New Information about Sandia National Laboratory to Read and Share Christopher Rufo, of the Discovery Institute and the Heritage Foundation, has updated information about the abuse and forced racist indoctrination at one of our country’s most prestigious nuclear research labs. Read his Twitter thread with the new information (retweet if you have a Twitter account, and just read it if you don’t). He has also written about these matters at his website, . | Make Real Civics Education a Priority Again Week of August 31st Keep an eye out every week for a new activity or book or lesson to bring real civics back to our children. () This week, we will study the real history of the Republican Party and civil rights. The media and the left love to portray the Republican Party as racist. They lie about history, as well as the current beliefs and positions of Republicans and conservatives more generally. However, the real history of America tells the truth, and we must ensure that young people know the truth so that they are not manipulated into losing the freedoms we all hold dear in America. After this week’s lesson, we will use the themes highlighted in each of the nights of the Republican National Convention to dive deeper into the history and civics of America, and the founding ideals that liberate and protect all Americans, no matter their race. – This blog post stretches from the founding of the Republican Party to the present and is full of details and historical facts that every American should know. Take your time to read through it and discuss as a family! – PragerU video, description: “When you think of the Republican Party, what comes to mind? If you’re like many Americans, you may associate the GOP with racism, sexism, and general inequality. It’s a commonly pushed narrative by left-leaning media and academia, but as former Vanderbilt Professor of Political Science Carol Swain explains, the Republican Party was actually responsible for nearly every advancement for minorities and women in U.S. history—and remains the champion of equality to this day.” Discussion Questions Ask your children to summarize, in their own words, the history of the Republican Party and black Americans. You’re not looking for exact dates here. You are looking for an understanding of how this history unfolded and major themes. Why would people today lie about this history – what could motivate them to hide the truth? Is it good for America and Americans of all races to know the truth of our history? Why? How could knowing the truth help to bring peace back to our cities that are currently under attack by rioters? In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin | Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. operates as a social welfare organization under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to Tea Party Patriots Action are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes. © 2020 80 M St SE, First Floor, Washington, D.C. 20003 |

Hey friend \- can you take a look at this?

**Our August Calendar Campaign ends tonight at midnight! **

We wanted to give you one last opportunity to rush a small-dollar contribution before the month ends to help Governor Holcomb keep delivering for Hoosiers.

We’re entering the home stretch of our campaign -- _just 64 days to go!_ \-- and our grassroots community is firing on all cylinders as we sprint to Election Day 2020.

That’s why we’re reaching out to every member of the Holcomb Crew and asking for only **[$8.31](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=ac62e984d89647c284323ff68f17e06b&_e=oKRcUWHMu2k8gPNwVw3lOVwFlsUiLnjzkhxkSCDRD6B31fLYk-TfF7FBgwvZY8KVOoz-rVb-789glt1V5fO1Vsd6pwoBl-aBgsZqvE8ARxhCYEeCZjI_YtAkgYf6giuHpFh2FIzo8H77hdrOl_fD55v5CfCIsMjuNyhQFpgexRyewXS_OwEM4nqiuse-5BBD2nD2rhKDy6cFeAdsbtYXz_SRaz-ZM9NIttIr9rymPEc6tzIG9Z6Zne68dHyv5sAiLPLr8N_dk42BQOKmQ6veSfNtyNmF_agu6suHo-vNaO-nAaQULGueIMh5ZcIK3Dz05vk7d1FJszFWY6PG9m8_32qtMM1jaWfor1p_YJlZo00rIsH3kq5R8fCK2NxoYAWrfPA7K3SShWaJyAW6quBB-e0oyBgYp1Ib7dm5yA2X_eYyo9DzhY09UC-fcYov9f8F2VbaLAMrrQcnfFSPCvtV3VEHmseojQFn4XiscUuGpBowvh1QokO3HWpwIIUGUJvJ) **(to match today’s date -- fun, right?).

_These campaigns are a crucial part of our campaign. Small-dollar donations like these go a long way to making sure Governor Holcomb can keep building One Indiana for All for another four years. _

We’re counting on you to come through for us, friend.

Will you join our Calendar Campaign and donate **[$8.31](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=ac62e984d89647c284323ff68f17e06b&_e=oKRcUWHMu2k8gPNwVw3lOVwFlsUiLnjzkhxkSCDRD6B31fLYk-TfF7FBgwvZY8KVOoz-rVb-789glt1V5fO1Vsd6pwoBl-aBgsZqvE8ARxhCYEeCZjI_YtAkgYf6giuHpFh2FIzo8H77hdrOl_fD55v5CfCIsMjuNyhQFpgexRyewXS_OwEM4nqiuse-5BBD2nD2rhKDy6cFeAdsbtYXz_SRaz-ZM9NIttIr9rymPEc6tzIG9Z6Zne68dHyv5sAiLPLr8N_dk42BQOKmQ6veSfNtyNmF_agu6suHo-vNaO_6D6gAJMh_z58wWhYw9e6aq7Z3gupqPwA0V-x55i8qJwcz-VsrJKv0eePdFn9znIrJTg5LuHWNNlU5_IPqz6KKuCskFQhKGs_g_itVZJ0NmR9nD66wQ89MTkbNZ5hnKGxtV9gP2sm6VKxq1K3eMWSeek4RDVmdxaUSsH-SCHx4hpzZi77QjUb1q-dSgEuPi_SqyhQoq_SgAJuVS8mwTTDk)** below?
[**Donate $8.31 —>**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=ac62e984d89647c284323ff68f17e06b&_e=oKRcUWHMu2k8gPNwVw3lOVwFlsUiLnjzkhxkSCDRD6B31fLYk-TfF7FBgwvZY8KVOoz-rVb-789glt1V5fO1Vsd6pwoBl-aBgsZqvE8ARxhCYEeCZjI_YtAkgYf6giuHpFh2FIzo8H77hdrOl_fD55v5CfCIsMjuNyhQFpgexRyewXS_OwEM4nqiuse-5BBD2nD2rhKDy6cFeAdsbtYXz_SRaz-ZM9NIttIr9rymPEc6tzIG9Z6Zne68dHyv5sAiLPLr8N_dk42BQOKmQ6veSfNtyNmF_agu6suHo-vNaO_6TmWMrEwFzxLYBBaTTInGDfkQs2PFom2U4hUM8BpKKSSxADYHbCOJLDJp3IaEwAnZdYLsyhVECtvp4jiQeC57CeEtaVBSu8A9i9HdwoJrjvggAGBSYtq6n--gWFf6NqfZWTUnW6Wl692uAbe53vxDcDLzx8qBtT0EsjV4BEwYVhYD3S5WzUARbMiB5bfrnWj9c6fl6tPjnN-CwKSQsss5)

| | We’ve already seen a glimpse of what the liberal Democrats in Washington want... they want to take New York’s disastrous bail reform nationally, defund and dismantle our local police precincts, and take away our freedoms by bringing socialism to America.

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Last call
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
We don't have millions like our GOP opponent.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8135%2E868730%2EdR5yWU) Friend, This is it: Our deadline is at midnight. We have just two months left to reach voters, and every single day counts. I know I've said this so many times, but I really live by it: _Early to bed, early to rise, work like hell and organize._ That mantra doesn't change, even if organizing looks different now than it used to. We still need to talk to voters, we still need to tell them our vision for a stronger future, and we still need grassroots donations. Our opponent has millions to fall back on thanks to the Republican Governors Association's war chest -- that's why we have to be prepared. **The dark money attacks are already up on TV. That's why I'm asking, because it's so important:[Will you donate $5 or more right now, before our huge midnight deadline?](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10919?t=4&akid=8135%2E868730%2EdR5yWU)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10920?t=5&akid=8135%2E868730%2EdR5yWU)

Very truly yours,
Jay

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20Rage=20Moms?=
subject: Today is Our Most Critical Deadline
body:
Unpaid Labor, Childcare, Paid Leave and Trump is on the Ballot | | | |
---
| | | [ ](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=d10c1fb560&e=3f151f8b74)
---
| [Chip in $8.31](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=06f01a4966&e=3f151f8b74 "Chip in $8.31")
---
|
### Friend,

We are in the home stretch of the most important election in our lifetime but it will require a lot of resources to keep fighting for what we believe in.

U.S. Sen. Patty Murray of Washington tweeted: “Rage moms, nanas, and parents across the country want COVID-19 relief, a functioning post office, racial justice, and a brighter future for our families. And you can bet we’re going to fight for them.”

This election could be decided by moms, by "the anger of women who find themselves constantly — [a](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=767d00744f&e=3f151f8b74)[nd indefinitely](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=89979992c0&e=3f151f8b74) — expected to be teacher, caregiver, employee, and parent.”

On the ballot, Nov. 3 will be Donald Trump, Joe Biden, invisible labor, unpaid child care, and the future of our democracy.

**ALL THE RAGE IS ON THE BALLOT.**

Can we bet on you to help us in this fight?

We still have a good chance to hit our goal today, but we need to receive a good amount of contributions to get there by midnight. We are a PAC relying on small-dollar donations and grassroots supporters which means we have to work ten times as hard to raise funds.

If you are able to make a [donation](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=e3f6f2b749&e=3f151f8b74) before midnight it would make a real difference to help reach this goal.

Thanks for everything and stay safe!

Moms in Office

---
