Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b29c/18e32a7f/4a710d25/7b20fa2c/1303415017/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, [_click here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b29c/18e32a7f/4a710d25/7b20fa2d/1303415017/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails").

If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. You can keep up with our campaign by visiting us on _[Facebook](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b29c/18e32a7f/4a710d25/7b20fa22/1303415017/VEsHAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan/")_ or _[Twitter](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b29c/18e32a7f/4a710d25/7b20fa2e/1303415017/VEsHAA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan")_ or _[Youtube](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b29c/18e32a7f/4a710d25/7b20fa28/1303415017/VEsHAw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.youtube.com/c/benraylujan")_ or online at _[benraylujan.com](www.benraylujan.com)_. name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: How Long Will Democrats Pretend the Chaos in Portland Is Normal?
body:
Rioters continue to loot Portland’s businesses and destroy private property, setting cars on fire, attempting to burn down federal property | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e2b5381dab&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **How Long Will Democrats Pretend the Chaos in Portland Is Normal?**

“Sunday morning’s headlines brought news of yet another death,” Kaylee McGhee writes for the _Washington Examiner_.

“Rioters continue to loot Portland’s businesses and destroy private property, setting cars on fire, attempting to burn down federal property, and encouraging others to do the same . . . And the one time law enforcement was able to contain the unrest, Oregon Democrats demanded that the federal officers assisting Portland police leave.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9499083888&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “The United States expects to have four coronavirus candidate vaccines in large-scale clinical trials by the middle of September, a remarkable timeline considering the SARS-CoV-2 virus was only discovered in December,” Elizabeth Weise and Karen Weintraub write. “We feel we are absolutely on track–if not a little bit ahead–in terms of our overall objective,” HHS Deputy Chief of Staff Paul Mango said. Read more in [_USA Today_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ff7057ceb2&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “A Star of David-adorned El Al plane flew from Israel to the United Arab Emirates on Monday, carrying a high-ranking American and Israeli delegation to Abu Dhabi in the first-ever direct commercial passenger flight between the two countries. The Israeli flag carrier’s flight marked the implementation of the historic U.S.-brokered deal to normalize relations between the two nations,” Aron Heller writes in [_The Associated Press_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=702ed9186f&e=3ee4985eea) _._
---
|
---
| “President Trump on Saturday toured damage from Hurricane Laura in Lake Charles, Louisiana, and Orange, Texas–two of the hardest-hit areas. Mr. Trump vowed assistance for both cities.” As of Saturday, FEMA had delivered millions of liters of water and more than a million meals to those affected by the storm. Read more in **[CBS News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=992cd7c575&e=3ee4985eea).**
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=578adff677&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=391f99c96d&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=b12ead8ee1)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

Kara Eastman is running to flip Nebraska's second district from red to blue. She has dedicated her entire career to bettering her community through nonprofits and social work. She was inspired to run for office after her mom got cancer for the 5th time, and was prescribed a pill that cost $2500. Kara's mom chose to keep her house, and lost her battle with cancer after losing her life-savings to cancer drugs. As Kara watched her Republican Representative Don Bacon vote to repeal the Affordable Care Act and rob millions of their access to health care, she knew she couldn't sit on the sidelines.

If you want to support Kara's campaign for Congress, [_**please rush in a donation here. >>**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e83e/77d4c309/219634de/2635efa6/4067175635/VEsHBw/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=em_footer&amount=25")

Another thing -- we know we send a lot of fundraising emails. It's because Kara has pledged not to take a cent of corporate PAC money. Unlike her Republican opponent, she relies on this grassroots community to fund her campaign. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from Kara, [_**please click here.**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e83e/77d4c309/219634de/2635efa1/4067175635/VEsHBg/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails") We'd hate to lose you completely, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, [_please click here._](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e83e/77d4c309/219634de/2635efa0/4067175635/VEsHAQ/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/content/unsub-footer/")

We can't tell you how much Kara appreciates your grassroots support!

7117 Farnam St, Ste. 2, Omaha, NE 68132
info@eastmanforcongress.com

name: Troy Nehls (iPhone)
subject: Deadline TONIGHT!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nehls for Congress
body:
I wasn't planning to write you today. But I just got off the phone with my team, and we're so close now...
Friend, I wasn’t planning to write you today. But I just got off the phone with my team, and we’re so close now...

We’re approaching a CRITICAL deadline and only need to **raise another $1,277** to reach our $30,000 fundraising goal!

It’s great news. We’re locked in a tough fight to keep this seat in the hands of a long time local public servant on November 3rd, and every bit of support helps me push back against the MILLIONS of outside money trying to buy our seat.

I’m humbled and grateful for your support! THANK YOU if you’ve already chipped in.

If you have not made an online contribution yet, will you make a $5, $10, or $20 contribution now to help fuel our fight to win?

Follow this link to chip in now:

**[https://secure.winred.com/troynehls/e-eom-3-082820](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/f11db9baf008deef/3adbff5a40ba10c5c3d6b838967d376c/35193)**

We’re kicking off our 60-Day Victory Drive this Friday, and it’s vital that we have the resources we need to fire up our core base and win over swing voters!

Troy Nehls
Sent from my iPhone Paid for by Nehls for Congress
---

This email was sent by: Troy Nehls
1612 CRABB RIVER RD, RICHMOND, TX, 77469
[Profile Center](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/procenter/procenter.cfm?action=profile&eid=5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694&c=35193&jid=f11db9baf008deef)
[Unsubscribe](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/unsubscribe1.cfm?eid=5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694&c=35193&jid=f11db9baf008deef)
[View as webpage](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/vm2/f11db9baf008deef/35193/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193)

subject: We're running out of time
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY COLLINS FOR TEXAS, INC**
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
---
| Peter,
We're rapidly running out of time to **stop the defunding of police and riots from engulfing every major American city.**

I cannot sit by and watch our nation and our state be destroyed by this radical progressive agenda.

We have an **absolutely critical fundraising deadline tonight at midnight** , and [I need your help.](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=3c1a58cd9b&e=68aaeb0998)

| This fight in which we're involved is truly for the soul of our nation, and **we MUST win.**

**Nancy Pelosi and the progressive super PACs are fighting against me** , but I know that [you will do what it takes](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=d560b016c9&e=68aaeb0998) to help law and order prevail.

Remember, we've got a [midnight fundraising deadline](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=bbc6c81634&e=68aaeb0998) tonight!

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Today is our last chance to hit our fundraising goal for August
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
If -- and only if -- we work together, we can get big things done. I can't do it alone, because in politics and government, no one ever does anything alone. Real change requires determined leaders on | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525076/45c30650/1c344d569/66e8dd78/4172503685/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Today is our last chance to hit our fundraising goal for August -- our last chance to make sure we're ready for the most important stretch of the most important election of our lifetimes.

**[If you'd be able to manage a donation at this time, will you pitch in $2 or whatever makes sense before our midnight deadline? Your contribution would help elect Warren Democrats up and down the ballot.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525076/45c30650/1c344d569/66e8dd7b/4172503685/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLWF1ZzIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNVTIxRl9FT01fRVdEX0VfMjAyMDA4MzFfVjFTMl9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-aug20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMU21F_EOM_EWD_E_20200831_V1S2_P")**

If -- and only if -- we work together, we can get big things done. I can't do it alone, because in politics and government, no one ever does anything alone. Real change requires determined leaders on the inside -- and a grassroots movement pushing from the outside.

So that's why this team is doing everything we can to elect Warren Democrats at every level of government. And that's why we're building our capacity at the grassroots level to fight for the bold reform we need.

But we can only fully carry out those plans if we hit our August fundraising goal. And the end-of-month deadline is just hours away.

So I'm asking if you can pitch in -- and I'm only asking because it is powerfully important that we reach this target.

[If making a financial contribution makes sense for you right now, will you donate before Monday's end-of-month deadline to help hit this powerfully important August fundraising goal?](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525076/45c30650/1c344d569/66e8dd7b/4172503685/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLWF1ZzIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNVTIxRl9FT01fRVdEX0VfMjAyMDA4MzFfVjFTMl9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-aug20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMU21F_EOM_EWD_E_20200831_V1S2_P")

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

| [**DONATE NOW**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525076/45c30650/1c344d569/66e8dd7b/4172503685/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLWF1ZzIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNVTIxRl9FT01fRVdEX0VfMjAyMDA4MzFfVjFTMl9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-aug20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMU21F_EOM_EWD_E_20200831_V1S2_P")

If you’ve been waiting to make a contribution, there’s never been a more important time to do so
Friend, I wouldn’t reach out if it wasn't important, but I just found out that we still need to raise $1,378 before midnight tonight, so I had to come to you one last time.

In this final stretch, every voter we reach and every dollar we raise could be the difference in what happens on Election Day. So, if you’ve been waiting to make a contribution, there’s never been a more urgent time to do so as we look towards these last weeks.

name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: ICYMI: National Federation of Independent Business Endorses Wesley
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
**ICYMI: National Federation of Independent Business Endorses Wesley**

In case you missed it, last week Wesley had the honor of receiving the endorsement of the National Federation of Independent Business (NFIB). The NFIB is one of the Nation's foremost advocates for small businesses, and NFIB's steadfast commitment to protecting the interests of workers and entrepreneurs resonates deeply with Wesley's.

_“Wesley Hunt is the best candidate to represent small businesses in Texas’ 7 th Congressional District,” _said **Annie Spilman, NFIB’s Texas State Director**._“Not only did Captain Hunt, a former commissioned Army Captain who served overseas, graduate from West Point and go on to study Business, Public Administration, and Industrial and Labor Relations, he carved out the time to be an active member of his community. Wesley Hunt has a proven commitment to his country and a strong understanding of what promotes a strong economic climate where small businesses can continue to grow. On behalf of Texas’ small businesses, we are proud to endorse him today.”

“We are confident that Wesley Hunt will be a strong pro-small business Member of Congress,” _said **NFIB National Political Director Sharon Sussin**. _“He is committed to standing up for the issues our members in Texas’ 7 th Congressional District care about, such as creating jobs, flood mitigation, and healthcare. We are pleased to endorse him today for election to the United States House of Representatives.”_
Houston is an incredible city full of opportunity because of its hardworking innovators and entrepreneurs. Wesley believes that the top priority of the government must be to empower small businesses to lead the way. Wesley looks forward to continuing to work with small business leaders to enable them to lead America beyond our current challenges and into a more prosperous, opportunity-rich future.

You can find the NFIB's full endorsement of Wesley [here](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=b1abf18227b4433993903b2b38118f8e&_e=QF1X4nkEFjQuajaA2SgXgEwWbOPVilk7MfDTiKQmFQ2N4rC8NKd6oNKHGOJFCLg6uEHzszYUxaVOQBx-zJ45yulSBaSxdqNsUPfIz6h20cGXONCORFwz2-HVzpSvxCZtBCAZnVHDv_-mBJ0o50pFSrHER5Z0qSJUSyNZfpt_hwYM7K3uQOnyUnSUELBlp2diPP2Z8MZqdyUlt3tCZI0mvlnmoRX62U15v_dsrcIyQruHUQ2FIzs2rJ8y658j2L4gVB83erxmeo2iapUXymZW5fio1p2HnNE33fmymCXgBJb9no8R5hSZFotOZmwF6jBfQwiGKorvSaHm7c0LeYAzAmNROKvb3TmS08n7GrKow8wEeoqQ9omrWME8P2JyNVWGd0AshBW73Av2l0KNGmRlyQ%3D%3D).

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=b1abf18227b4433993903b2b38118f8e&_e=QF1X4nkEFjQuajaA2SgXgFoh47zowmxjLnkaYslfUzA1eH1gZEtA0w-a8AdwX_XKtl2juR_zrTPlx-zAdac9x3Q3ltgUlppkNMLpKGO7OSKci25v5fm84QO76L5Mq3DGwlHZcCpaHfXsLaO4Kl6gGhF-fU0HKoPYVcAbz-czV9MJ91Rz8uiJEZupDyd7iBphePrZ4E0SJWYpz6EqqkITzgSuPMCWiwTSB-cmseFOd-Zlrk87Fvnak4TAd4YuGUnGGhMHjQF-qLdSjz8Fr3n-clFEYYiwRPjOqUhQA5ivGrI%3D)****

name: Kamala Harris
subject: Please, Peter, can you help us send a clear message
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
I have something I have to ask of Team Joe: |
---

Peter -- the last few weeks since joining Joe Biden's ticket have been a whirlwind -- but in the best way.

Team Joe has welcomed me with open arms, and the energy for this Biden-Harris ticket has been electric. But now, I have something I have to ask of Team Joe:

**This is my first end-of-month fundraising deadline as Joe 's running mate, and it's a public one, which means it will be no secret how we do, so I want to make sure we raise as much as we can before midnight tonight.**

[Can you chip in right now to help raise the $157,500 we still need from Pennsylvania before midnight? Anything you're able to give will make a real difference and send a clear message about the momentum this campaign has built this month.](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_aug_eom?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.31_B2_KDHEOM_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.31_B2_KDHEOM_X__F1_S2_C1__full") | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

---
Peter, as we saw this past week at the RNC, Trump and his campaign are looking for any opportunity to attack Joe, me, and the campaign we're all building together.

This first public fundraising deadline of the general election is our opportunity to show just how fired up Democrats are to win up and down the ballot in November.

But if we are outraised by Trump and Pence, they will be able to spin up a narrative that we lack the momentum we need to win.

And beyond that, it's about more than hitting a deadline goal. We have so few days left in this campaign that any day we go without the resources we need to compete is a day we could fall behind.

If we're going to reach the voters we need to win, we're counting on more grassroots supporters from Pennsylvania digging deep and making their first donation before midnight tonight.

[Peter, will you donate today to make sure my first end-of-month fundraising goal on the ticket is a success?](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_aug_eom?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.31_B2_KDHEOM_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.31_B2_KDHEOM_X__F1_S2_C1__full")

For The People,

Kamala
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b108/1cd0ac28/154521088/3570b3a2/1495436138/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b108/1cd0ac28/154521088/3570b3a1/1495436138/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b108/1cd0ac28/154521088/3570b3a0/1495436138/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b108/1cd0ac28/154521088/3570b39f/1495436138/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b108/1cd0ac28/154521088/3570b39e/1495436138/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b108/1cd0ac28/154521088/3570b39d/1495436138/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b108/1cd0ac28/154521088/3570b39c/1495436138/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b108/1cd0ac28/154521088/3570b39b/1495436138/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b108/1cd0ac28/154521088/3570b39a/1495436138/VEsEBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b108/1cd0ac28/154521088/3570b399/1495436138/VEsEBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b108/1cd0ac28/154521088/3570b39c/1495436138/VEsEBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b108/1cd0ac28/154521088/3570b398/1495436138/VEsEBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b108/1cd0ac28/154521088/3570b39b/1495436138/VEsEAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b108/1cd0ac28/154521088/3570b397/1495436138/VEsEAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

name: Lisa Scheller
subject: Outdoorsmen for Scheller
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Scheller for Congress, Inc
body:
**LISA SCHELLER RELEASES FOURTH COALITION TODAY** **OUTDOORSMEN FOR SCHELLER**
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
Brooke Race
Info@schellerforcongress.com

Allentown, Pa. – Today, the Scheller Campaign is proud to announce its fourth coalition, Outdoorsmen for Scheller. Lisa Scheller strongly stands with the second amendment and believes in the right to bear arms. She owns a gun, has her concealed carry permit, and is a lifetime member of the NRA. The Chairwomen for Outdoorsmen for Scheller is Maureen Gyory who is an NRA Basic Pistol Instructor, an Act 235 PA Lethal Weapons agent and a Range Safety Officer at Relic Hunter Firing Line in Coplay PA. Her passion is teaching individuals how to use firearms safely, accurately and morally.

Maureen released the following statement:

“I support Lisa Scheller because she epitomizes the hard working American that built this country. She understands the importance of individual rights and how they affect our freedom of choice. Her involvement in the shooting sports proves that she is a staunch supporter of the 2nd amendment. Her personal success in business shows that she is financially responsible and savvy. Success in her life will translate to success in congress. I want a government run by people who make good personal choices in their own lives. clean_body: LISA SCHELLER RELEASES FOURTH COALITION TODAY OUTDOORSMEN FOR SCHELLER FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Brooke Race Info@schellerforcongress.com Allentown, Pa. – Today, the Scheller Campaign is proud to announce its fourth coalition, Outdoorsmen for Scheller. Lisa Scheller strongly stands with the second amendment and believes in the right to bear arms. She owns a gun, has her concealed carry permit, and is a lifetime member of the NRA. The Chairwomen for Outdoorsmen for Scheller is Maureen Gyory who is an NRA Basic Pistol Instructor, an Act 235 PA Lethal Weapons agent and a Range Safety Officer at Relic Hunter Firing Line in Coplay PA. Her passion is teaching individuals how to use firearms safely, accurately and morally. Maureen released the following statement: “I support Lisa Scheller because she epitomizes the hard working American that built this country. She understands the importance of individual rights and how they affect our freedom of choice. Her involvement in the shooting sports proves that she is a staunch supporter of the 2nd amendment. Her personal success in business shows that she is financially responsible and savvy. Success in her life will translate to success in congress. I want a government run by people who make good personal choices in their own lives. And Lisa is the perfect example of this.” Paid for by Lisa Scheller for Congress, Inc.

name: Team Sri
subject: See you soon!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/event-spk-mj-08312020-jointvfr [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/event-spk-mj-08312020-jointvfr]
Friend,
Sri Preston Kulkarni and MJ Hegar are hosting an event TONIGHT 8/31 @7pm CT to break down their Path to Victory in November and we want you there to hear from them personally.
Support Sri and MJ! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/event-spk-mj-08312020-jointvfr]
Texas Democrats have a historic opportunity to flip TX blue for the first time in decades. TX-22 (the largest congressional district in the country by population) has the most votes to offer up and down the ballot.
Supporting Sri in TX-22 empowers all democratic efforts in Fort Bend, Brazoria, and Harris County. Supporting MJ's race supports candidates down ballot all across the state!
We'll see you tonight, click here to RSVP [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/event-spk-mj-08312020-jointvfr] !
Thanks,
Team Sri
Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.
Please visit our COVID-19 community resource guide [https://sri2020.com/covid-19-community-resources/] to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.28_b1_a_all&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.28_b1_a_all&amount=25]
Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington.
Help send Sri to Congress! ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.28_b1_a_all&amount=25]
Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at sri2020.com [https://sri2020.com/]
Paid for by Sri for Congress

Josh grew up in Fleming County before leaving to serve in the Marines. After two deployments, he returned to Kentucky to serve his community as a police officer and attorney.

He’s running to represent hardworking, everyday Kentuckians. Not corporations. That means his campaign is relying on grassroots donations — lots of small donations from emails like this — not big checks from corporate special interests. | | **We’re just a few dollars short of our goal** **It’s not cheap running a campaign for statewide office. My opponent has accepted thousands of dollars from PACs and the Democrat party. ** **As of this morning, we are $581 from reaching our end-of-month fundraising goal. We only have two months left until the November election, so time is of the essence.** **Please consider donating to my campaign. Help send a businessman with broad experience in the industries this office oversees and a combat veteran with a strong history of service to others._We are so close to reaching our goal. My opponent is raising money from far-left Berkeley liberals. _**

Dear Friend, Yesterday I told you we needed $3,129 to reach our August goal, and asked **[Can you help us get there with a quick donation?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18946261/244585211/-1907457920?refcode=RKC_083120ff_em_fr_all_eoq2_Line2&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWI0N2Y0OS1lMGViLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Oso1ZQPmkp9ZQMchAWLFcKuiACas2Y4j-whZaFzZoaE=)** You absolutely smashed it out of the ballpark - as I write this, we've exceeded our goal by $547! _Huge news - we reached our goal of 150 unique donors for August! _

_Thanks to the support of Nancy Pelosi and other big-time Democrats, our opponent has outraised us every step of the way. He had their backs on Capitol Hill, and they’ve returned the favor on the campaign trail. _

name: Virginia Senate Update
subject: Major deadline TONIGHT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | Derek --

Meeting our August end-of-month fundraising goal is absolutely critical to making sure that we re-elect Mark Warner -- and we're so close! Can you help us meet our goal and start this last stretch of the campaign off strong?

**For the last day of our end-of-month fundraising push, generous supporters are matching every donation, which means your contribution goes twice as far.** | [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db0e/53d9897e/55d7e301/1c883f3b/1388328995/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc0NCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-eomaug?refcode=20200831_f_1_nd__744__&refcode2=graphic1&amount=5")
---

**[Will you pitch in _now_ to help Mark meet his fundraising goal by midnight?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db0e/53d9897e/55d7e301/1c883f3a/1388328995/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc0NCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-eomaug?refcode=20200831_f_1_nd__744__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**
Election Day is coming up fast -- in just 64 days, we have the chance to chart a new path forward with new leadership in the White House and Democratic majorities in the House and Senate. But to make that dream a reality, we've got to re-elect the Democratic Senators who are already working hard for us in Washington, folks like Mark Warner.

Mark has been working hard to keep front line workers safe, to help small businesses stay open, and to make sure Virginia's schools are funded, no matter if their classes are in person or online. **But with time running short, he needs your help to win re-election so he can keep fighting for _all_ Virginians.**

**[Can Mark count on your support? Until midnight, your donation has _double_ the impact.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db0e/53d9897e/55d7e301/1c883f39/1388328995/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc0NCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-eomaug?refcode=20200831_f_1_nd__744__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")**

Thank you so much,

Team Warner

[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db0e/53d9897e/55d7e301/1c883f38/1388328995/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc0NCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-eomaug?refcode=20200831_f_1_nd__744__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")
---

|

1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

name: Margaret Good (personal device)
subject: last chance
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
body:
Friend —

We are just a few hours away from our big end-of-month fundraising deadline, and I’m reaching out to you one last time to ask if you can help us reach our must-hit $25,000 fundraising goal.

Vote by Mail ballots are arriving in voters’ mailboxes in less than a month and we need the resources to get our message out to voters before they return their ballots.

We are only $4,275 away from our goal and we can reach it if I can count on you and my most trusted supporters to step up again right now.

Please, can you rush an urgent contribution before our critical midnight fundraising deadline? You can use this secure link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/margaretgoodfl16](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18947263/244601014/1073285021?refcode2=3d6de28d-e6eb-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emci=21dcce89-c6eb-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=3d6de28d-e6eb-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&refcode=083120-es-eom-6-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDZkZTI4ZC1lNmViLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6HLelSGem3zHeQ3-GSVrBinEWBktQuHff5BoHMaCscI=)**

Together, we can flip this seat and bring accountability to Washington.

Thank you for helping power this campaign.

— Margaret

PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
---
Margaret Good for Congress
PO Box 5073
Sarasota, FL 34277
United States
Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us.
Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, and we are excited to have your support! You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support—that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. Our campaign has taken a pledge to reject corporate PAC money and is instead funded by thousands of actual people who care about our democracy and want to see positive change in our community and across our country. **[If you'd like to donate, click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18947264/244601015/788213855?refcode=emfooter&amount=25&recurring=1&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDZkZTI4ZC1lNmViLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6HLelSGem3zHeQ3-GSVrBinEWBktQuHff5BoHMaCscI=)**
If you’d like to volunteer, **[click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18947265/244601016/-1805212762?refcode=083120-es-eom-6-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDZkZTI4ZC1lNmViLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6HLelSGem3zHeQ3-GSVrBinEWBktQuHff5BoHMaCscI=&emci=21dcce89-c6eb-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=3d6de28d-e6eb-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=9814644)**
If you’d like to unsubscribe, we hate to see you go, but click here to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/21dcce89-c6eb-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb/3d6de28d-e6eb-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDZkZTI4ZC1lNmViLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6HLelSGem3zHeQ3-GSVrBinEWBktQuHff5BoHMaCscI=&id=113801977) .

name: Sri Preston Kulkarni
subject: (no subject line)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
Friend --

I just wanted to send you a quick email before the day is over.

We’re headed into the last two months of this campaign, and I could not be more grateful to be in this fight alongside you.

We’ve built a strong grassroots family here in TX-22. We’ve changed the perception of what is possible in this district -- and we’re going to use these last two months to defy expectations once again.

And when we win in November and deliver change to Washington on behalf of our families come January, it will have been possible thanks to your support.

In the next few hours, my team will begin finalizing our infrastructure for the last phase of our campaign before Election Day. I know we’ve been emailing all week, but I’m thinking of the hard work of our volunteers and my staff -- and I know that meeting this goal will make their work just a bit easier in the months ahead.

So if you can, chip in: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.31_si_b3_all&amount=15

Thank you for everything, friend. I can’t wait to see what we can accomplish together.

--Sri

Sent from my iphone

Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

Please visit our COVID-19 community resource guide [https://sri2020.com/covid-19-community-resources/] to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe.

Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington.
Help send Sri to Congress! ➜ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.31_si_b3_all&amount=15

Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at https://sri2020.com/

Paid for by Sri for Congress
SRI FOR CONGRESS P.O. BOX 898 SUGAR LAND, TX 77487-0898 [#]
If you wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/e9aae443-d3eb-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb/fe26d00a-e7eb-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTI2ZDAwYS1lN2ViLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2Z1yd5JTg0AGmW_5-a1Tg_JFejg6UqPlSiElnQBCC1k=&id=117373579 .

Texas Democrats are scared. Here's how I know: national progressives like Beto O'Rourke are holding fundraisers for my opponent. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/willdouglasfortexas/august-31-2020?e=4f010155df)

| | Hey, Team -

Texas Democrats are scared. Here's how I know: national progressives like Beto O'Rourke are holding fundraisers for my opponent.

They're right to be terrified \- this race is one of the tightest in the state. Our first record-breaking fundraising period gave us a ton of momentum, but Election Day is 64 days away and we can’t afford to ease up just yet.

While my opponent can count on thousands of dollars in special interest money directed by Beto O'Rourke - I rely on grassroots donors like you.

Today is our end-of month fundraising deadline. It’s our chance to show my opponent that we are just getting started. Can I count on you to help me keep the momentum going?

Help me keep it up by donating any amount to my campaign at this secure link:
[https://secure.winred.com/douglas-for-state-house/contribute](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=039c1d4f70&e=4f010155df)

Thank you,

body:
Mitch is spending MILLIONS to stop Jon Ossoff |
---
Hey friend -- hear the news??

**Mitch McConnell's super PAC is spending more against Jon Ossoff than any other Democratic U.S. Senate candidate.**
**David Perdue is officially Mitch's No. 1 recipient of crooked PAC money!**

Our momentum is off the charts, friend -- but Trump, McConnell, and their army of crooked donors will do *anything* to stop us.

**[Friend, can you pitch in $10 ASAP before the end-of-August fundraising deadline TONIGHT so we can stay competitive with McConnell's buckets of outside money?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2b01/5b2c1286/38232522/25f0ccc4/864191467/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_29_eom_wsj_pac?refcode=em_2020_08_31_eom_wsj_pack&amount=10")**

Appreciate all your support, friend!

Elias Duncan
Digital Director
Jon Ossoff for U.S. Senate

**\-------- Begin Forwarded Message ---------**

**From:** Jon Ossoff (personal)
**To:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Date:** August 29, 2020
**Subject:** BREAKING: I am officially Mitch McConnell's No. 1 target

**Friend, Mitch McConnell's super PAC is spending more against me than any other Democratic candidate for U.S. Senate.**

**_This is the most competitive Senate race in America._** [](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2b01/5b2c1286/38232522/25f0ccc7/864191467/VEsC/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_29_eom_wsj_pac?refcode=em_2020_08_31_eom_wsj_pac") **It's clear, friend: McConnell, Trump, and the interests they serve know Senator David Perdue's campaign is a _sinking ship_.**

**Ever since Perdue was caught buying protective medical equipment and vaccine stock while misleading the public about COVID-19, he's been in freefall. He got so desperate, he even started running an anti-Semitic attack ad against me.**

**Now Mitch McConnell is spending more to attack me than any other Democratic Senate candidate in the country.**

_But their tricks and smears aren't working. The latest poll found me LEADING the disgraced incumbent 48% to 46%._

Our momentum is off the charts -- but McConnell and his donors are spending gobsmacking sums and throwing the kitchen sink in a desperate last-ditch effort to stop my campaign.

**We will win this race, friend -- but only with your help.**

**[Mitch McConnell's shady super PAC's donors think they can overwhelm us with millions of dollars from Washington. **Mitch McConnell and his loyal footsoldier David Perdue have no record to run on but disease, unemployment, and corruption. They're everything that's wrong with Washington. But they have deep pockets.**

**[Friend, keep Mitch mad. ## **** 64 DAYS TO ELECTION DAY****
[**We are making ground!**](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/248288?id=136094.517.1.db21b9078557dc72e22b27badd28bdb0) [**Our race to WIN the 36th District seat is neck and neck!**](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/248288?id=136094.518.1.b4b9478a543f52a6b84bbd5ab9018f22) [**Inside polls show we are on track for a HUGE WIN in November.**](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/248288?id=136094.519.1.835e0ec83d26a39606518c982cfea98d) This weekend's inside polls show my opponent has 48 percent and Erin Cruz has 46 percent, with 6 percent undecided. Last week's inside polls had my opponent at 49 percent and Erin Cruz at 45 percent, with 6 percent undecided. My opponent must also have inside polling because he is actively campaigning for the first time in nearly seven years and he has actually received a [proxy](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/248288?id=136094.520.1.10bc47aeb5ce9807b76fb5bd19128654), wrongfully handing our votes to Rep. Aguilar, so he can stay in District. My opponent's justification for proxy was to ensure he is not risking his life being possibly exposed to COVID-19. Instead of practicing what he preaches and following stay at home orders he is out campaigning, even on Saturdays. The radical left has brought out big money Dr. Jill Biden to help my opponent -- and [**he STILL CAN'T keep the uniting of Grassroots and our base from making ground!**](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/248288?id=136094.521.1.a2dd74eb8a5b9faf48202f6b5e68a587) It is 2020, you can't buy the people. [**People just like you are fed up.**](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/248288?id=136094.522.1.a28b703d4d01640f488cb2cbe4716910) Fed up with the constant lockdown, the impact on businesses, the shuttering of longstanding family owned businesses that have been around 10, 20, even 25 years -- for good. New small businesses have been shuttered as well. Ruiz has consistently insisted on closure, insisted we not gather in groups. This includes places of faith. Ruiz has not pushed back on the infringement of religious liberty by government. If he is ok impeding on religious liberty, what are the limits? What will stop him from pushing this agenda again, hurting our community, increasing poverty, increasing suicide rates? There is no limit it seems. [**Enough is enough.**](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/248288?id=136094.523.1.3154bf1d8def206d4b009eb4efed13a6) [**Our grassroots campaign with no special interests, no big medical, no big pharma, no big lobby tied funding is uniting our people who are fed up with do nothing, big-time politicians like my opponent.**](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/248288?id=136094.524.1.01e341f54edfc15e1b39ade1648e97ca) We need to continue to get out the word and stand together. Why am I reaching out? We need your help! Below are grassroots signs put up throughout the district -- WE NEED MORE!! [**I want to keep our momentum going...**](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/248288?id=136094.525.1.f26343183ad22c07f5d9f9c960f4c1ea) We need 4k by Friday to get another batch of signs! You can help! You donation of [**$10**](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/248288?id=136094.526.1.881f514fce2b56e07d6c15726906f82c), [**$25**](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/248288?id=136094.527.1.71f6a3958b8910b3f3b291467630310a), [**$100**](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/248288?id=136094.528.1.9dcd0c220caa6ff0c489a3c278dbdda6), or for those who can, [**$1000**](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/248288?id=136094.529.1.f18dbaf9e7534343c8f05fb846d3e94e) adds up! I need you to step up. You have stood by my side throughout this Election, and I need to know you’ll be by my side November 3rd. [**Please make a contribution to help us CRUSH our goal and Get Out The Vote, returning our district to the people, not special interests.**](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/248288?id=136094.530.1.2695769fc5b8c3cc8db89c91c881db9b)

Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b299/18e32a7f/4a76b87d/7b20fad7/985725594/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, [_click here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b299/18e32a7f/4a76b87d/7b20fad4/985725594/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails").

If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. You can keep up with our campaign by visiting us on _[Facebook](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b299/18e32a7f/4a76b87d/7b20fad5/985725594/VEsHAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan/")_ or _[Twitter](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b299/18e32a7f/4a76b87d/7b20fad1/985725594/VEsHAA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan")_ or _[Youtube](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b299/18e32a7f/4a76b87d/7b20fad3/985725594/VEsHAw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.youtube.com/c/benraylujan")_ or online at _[benraylujan.com](www.benraylujan.com)_. Click [_here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b299/18e32a7f/4a76b87d/7b20faca/985725594/VEsHAg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe") to unsubscribe and your request will be promptly processed.

subject: The GOP is untethered
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez
body:
I'll be blunt -- President Trump and the GOP are completely untethered from the struggles of working Americans.
It's been _an entire month_ since the $600 unemployment credit expired. Meanwhile, Mitch McConnell is letting the _Heroes Act_ collect dust on his desk.
The Trump Administration and the Republican party have fatally mishandled the COVID-19 health crisis and yet are doing **nothing** to help everyday Americans overcome unprecedented obstacles.
[**Help me fight for working Americans in Congress | Make a Donation >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/jPsiw6XGzHVXyZ_USkQppip5CaNgXOkuuhXZfFzAaTc=/HFA07o7qvSk_F8hTuPk2jCdFXLVbdj6EPqITfcJeq5s=?refcode=X_083120_EOM_H)
This November, we need to not only keep the House blue, but win back the Presidency _and_ the Senate -- the well-being of working Americans depend on it.
As long as I'm in Congress, I will fight for policies that directly benefit the people of CA-38, like affordable childcare, lowering prescription drug prices, and protecting our essential workers. To keep doing that, however, I need to win re-election in November.
[**If you can, will you help me out by _RUSHING_ a contribution to my re-election campaign before our fundraising deadline tonight?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/jPsiw6XGzHVXyZ_USkQppip5CaNgXOkuuhXZfFzAaTc=/h5vDYwbdipwl8dNcwYFkslqYcrRXG-cNKP4Y0Q9Ev2U=?refcode=X_083120_EOM_H)

name: Bill Olson
subject: Kenosha shows why we need 2A!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=g24DfI2lkF6OuRU&b=cmZwkO21PwjZLI8Wrnj94g

Hi Peter,

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet who just overwhelmingly won my primary, by 20 points! I am the Republican who will flip this swing district because people here want law and order and are tired of the Biden Riots! I will stand shoulder to shoulder with President Trump as we fight far-Left extremist Socialism!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=g24DfI2lkF6OuRU&b=cmZwkO21PwjZLI8Wrnj94g

The Biden Riots have been horrific all year long. I cannot believe that the liberal Democrat mayors of this country have not restored law and order by attesting the violent, in some cases murderous, Antifa rioters!

What happened in Kenosha, Wisconsin is the best example of why we NEED the Second Amendment, and why we must fight this year to protect it.

Kyle Rittenhouse, a young man who works in Kenosha, decided to clean up the graffiti left by the rioters the previous night. He stuck around to offer medical help to the injured rioters (!) and protect the businesses from more destruction and looting.

Just like with Sandmann, the media, especially CNN and the Washington Post, immediately attacked this kid. They attacked him because he did not allow a crazed, violent mob to kill him.

In a word, these violent rioters were trying to kill this kid- to cancel him, FOR NO GOOD REASON.

In a statement late Friday, Rittenhouse's attorneys said he was defending himself from a "mob" of attackers who "accosted" and "verbally threatened and taunted" him while he was guarding a mechanic’s shop on Sheridan Road with a group of armed men and he was legally justified in firing the weapon.

Rittenhouse was being chased when he heard a gunshot behind him, the release said. He said he turned and was faced with "an attacker lunging towards him and reaching for his rifle."

According to the criminal complaint, 26-year-old Joseph Rosenbaum, who was unarmed, was fatally shot by Rittenhouse.

The release goes on to describe "a growing mob" that chased Rittenhouse down the street until he fell down. The people chasing him "kicked" him and "bashed him over the head with a skateboard."

The criminal complaint describes that a crowd followed Rittenhouse, with people shouting "get him!" and saying he had just shot someone. Several people tried to disarm Rittenhouse, including 26-year-old Anthony Huber, who was holding a skateboard in his right hand and reached for the teen's gun with his other hand.

Given attacks by this crazed mob, it's a good thing this kid was armed. If I were him, I would be armed too- and I would have put these violent attackers into the ground also.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=g24DfI2lkF6OuRU&b=cmZwkO21PwjZLI8Wrnj94g

The Fake News media is making this kid out to be a bloodthirsty white supremacist, but there's no evidence of that at all! They just don't like a good American kid utilizing his Second Amendment rights to defend himself against violent extremists who would have attacked him and killed him otherwise.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=g24DfI2lkF6OuRU&b=cmZwkO21PwjZLI8Wrnj94g

The media are dedicated to the complete destruction of America, and they are equally devoted to the destruction of our freedoms. They hate our Second Amendment and they want to slime this kid because of it.

Here's the good news: The American people see the media for what it is!

These Antifa extremists and their far-Left allies in the media and the Democrat party only win if we let them! That's why we MUST win this year!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=g24DfI2lkF6OuRU&b=cmZwkO21PwjZLI8Wrnj94g

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=g24DfI2lkF6OuRU&b=cmZwkO21PwjZLI8Wrnj94g

I'm an unapologetic patriot, and I am a Constitutionalist. I believe in our Second Amendment and I will fight to defend it!

This very week, Nancy Pelosi called us Republicans "enemies of the state". She is actively promoting these "Biden Riots" and all their political violence against conservatives. We cannot let these people win again this year, or they will cancel us. It is that simple.

But I have taken an oath to the Constitution- one that has no expiration date! I am a patriot and I need your help to counter the media's lies!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=g24DfI2lkF6OuRU&b=cmZwkO21PwjZLI8Wrnj94g

I am calling all Trump patriots to help me to replace Socialist Darren Soto, and stand up for our freedoms as Americans! I am now the official Republican nominee, and I need your help to win in November!

I need your help to stand up FOR the Constitution and AGAINST Communism!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=g24DfI2lkF6OuRU&b=cmZwkO21PwjZLI8Wrnj94g

Can you help me?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=g24DfI2lkF6OuRU&b=cmZwkO21PwjZLI8Wrnj94g
This is a swing district and we can take it back! Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=g24DfI2lkF6OuRU&b=cmZwkO21PwjZLI8Wrnj94g
today? Time is running out- that's why I need your help today!

I'm going to make sure the radical Democrats like Biden and Soto lose BIG this year - with your help!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=g24DfI2lkF6OuRU&b=cmZwkO21PwjZLI8Wrnj94g

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=g24DfI2lkF6OuRU&b=cmZwkO21PwjZLI8Wrnj94g

P.S. I really need your help today

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=g24DfI2lkF6OuRU&b=cmZwkO21PwjZLI8Wrnj94g
, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=g24DfI2lkF6OuRU&b=cmZwkO21PwjZLI8Wrnj94g
Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

Rittenhouse was being chased when he heard a gunshot behind him, the release said. He said he turned and was faced with "an attacker lunging towards him and reaching for his rifle." According to the criminal complaint, 26-year-old Joseph Rosenbaum, who was unarmed, was fatally shot by Rittenhouse. The release goes on to describe "a growing mob" that chased Rittenhouse down the street until he fell down. The people chasing him "kicked" him and "bashed him over the head with a skateboard." The criminal complaint describes that a crowd followed Rittenhouse, with people shouting "get him!" and saying he had just shot someone. Several people tried to disarm Rittenhouse, including 26-year-old Anthony Huber, who was holding a skateboard in his right hand and reached for the teen's gun with his other hand. Given attacks by this crazed mob, it's a good thing this kid was armed. If I were him, I would be armed too- and I would have put these violent attackers into the ground also. Image The Fake News media is making this kid out to be a bloodthirsty white supremacist, but there's no evidence of that at all! They just don't like a good American kid utilizing his Second Amendment rights to defend himself against violent extremists who would have attacked him and killed him otherwise. Image The media are dedicated to the complete destruction of America, and they are equally devoted to the destruction of our freedoms. They hate our Second Amendment and they want to slime this kid because of it. Here's the good news: The American people see the media for what it is! These Antifa extremists and their far-Left allies in the media and the Democrat party only win if we let them! That's why we MUST win this year! Image I'm an unapologetic patriot, and I am a Constitutionalist. I believe in our Second Amendment and I will fight to defend it! This very week, Nancy Pelosi called us Republicans "enemies of the state". She is actively promoting these "Biden Riots" and all their political violence against conservatives. We cannot let these people win again this year, or they will cancel us. It is that simple. But I have taken an oath to the Constitution- one that has no expiration date! I am a patriot and I need your help to counter the media's lies! I am calling all Trump patriots to help me to replace Socialist Darren Soto, and stand up for our freedoms as Americans! I am now the official Republican nominee, and I need your help to win in November! I need your help to stand up FOR the Constitution and AGAINST Communism! Can you help me? This is a swing district and we can take it back! Can I count on you for a donation today? Time is running out- that's why I need your help today! I'm going to make sure the radical Democrats like Biden and Soto lose BIG this year - with your help! Let's get this done! Image Bill Olson Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars Supports President Trump Not a Career Politician Hard Core Conservative Fighter Image P.S. I really need your help today , so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP! Thank you and God bless America! - Bill. PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS Bill Olson is a retired member of the United States Army. name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Ready to learn
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
Earlier this summer, we introduced the five metrics we'd be looking at when making a decision about school reopening. These metrics required the state, municipalities, and school districts to each meet stringent safety requirements before schools can reopen this fall. We knew that meeting these goals would be a monumental task, but that we owed it to our students to get it right.
Today, after months of hard work, I'm proud that every school district, with the exception of Providence and Central Falls, has met all our reopening requirements and has the green light to begin to reopen for full in-person learning on September 14.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eRG4ZJwKKqtiUNam1OYef_78IklhX-4ypf-GROMm3EP5_Ccr7kl4RKKi0QNa-y7-CYCQwbFJTbZIkFrhwSsq9ClyNei6eiR4X8JyTAj07XfZC88HrmWfmRkRfB0MhhU0UKceu5Cm0vwlEo3iXQ24aTJ63Zp_INKwuOwwQ7Ez95T0N-Fnh7lfQ76G9q_V9pOIVg5UkV2mrzc=&c=ILaMIKN3p-80lY7su9z8xWgkNr6iFPRzW5LQOvs3U10bp0zUF-nc5g==&ch=Bc8hygDwEcJB4EsWovyZVdvRvb8LslolzW8XHj_5B6Pkwjj8CMPSSA==)
---
| This wouldn't be possible without the hard work of hundreds of education and health professionals across the state. I want to go over in detail exactly what the metrics are and how we're stacking up.
Our first metric is statewide data. We said that in order to feel confident in full reopening, our statewide data would need to meet our criteria to stay in Phase 3. It does. As you can see in the slide below, in all four areas, we are comfortably within the metric to stay in Phase 3. Less than 10% of our COVID beds are filled, our new hospitalizations are consistently 15 or fewer, our rate of spread is right around 1, and our total hospitalizations are decreasing.
---
|
---
| Our second metric is municipal data. In order to feel confident that the prevalence of the disease was low enough in a community to fully reopen schools, we had to see fewer than 100 cases per 100,000 per week. Every community in Rhode Island is well below this level, except for Providence and Central Falls. Our third metric is testing readiness. We must be able to test all symptomatic staff and students within 48-72 hours. As a state, we've made major progress on testing over the last few weeks. Our average test turnaround time, which was nearly 5 days in July, was down to 1.8 days last week. We're also creating a separate K-12 testing system, with more than a dozen dedicated swab sites for students and teachers and 10 rapid machines, which I'll talk more about tomorrow.
---
|
---
| Our fourth metric is supply readiness. In order to accommodate all students returning to school in-person, every school must have sufficient cleaning supplies and face masks. District leaders have been working around the clock to secure supplies and the state has provided back-up supplies to every public school, including nearly 3,000 thermometers, 600,000 masks, 5,000 gowns and 15,000 containers of disinfectant to schools. Parents, teachers and students should feel confident they will have the supplies they need to stay safe.
Our fifth metric is operational readiness. In order to reopen, schools needed to submit a reopening plan that includes necessary health precautions for students and faculty. I'm proud to say that 100% of districts submitted plans that have been vetted by RIDE and RIDOH.
I want to thank all of the districts for their hard work. Meeting these metrics was not an easy task, and schools have been incredibly innovative in how they've risen to this challenge. I hope that seeing these metrics laid out helps to assure you that we are treating student and staff safety with the utmost importance.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eRG4ZJwKKqtiUNam1OYef_78IklhX-4ypf-GROMm3EP5_Ccr7kl4RCWddz7o0eT5dPIpBdZO1tC-A_WfzP16CqR8k5j7igIBFrs7qSFeW-vs3Jki9ng7-12DPsFU3b7I8aHIe5rLE17WgUbs9pl47CCyIFk-jeG_DZooOgKQkoG0xfKtFYn-R6B-4LJ0C0wzjTVw8vupjZk=&c=ILaMIKN3p-80lY7su9z8xWgkNr6iFPRzW5LQOvs3U10bp0zUF-nc5g==&ch=Bc8hygDwEcJB4EsWovyZVdvRvb8LslolzW8XHj_5B6Pkwjj8CMPSSA==)
---
| Click the graph to see check the Department of Health's [COVID-19 data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eRG4ZJwKKqtiUNam1OYef_78IklhX-4ypf-GROMm3EP5_Ccr7kl4RCWddz7o0eT5dPIpBdZO1tC-A_WfzP16CqR8k5j7igIBFrs7qSFeW-vs3Jki9ng7-12DPsFU3b7I8aHIe5rLE17WgUbs9pl47CCyIFk-jeG_DZooOgKQkoG0xfKtFYn-R6B-4LJ0C0wzjTVw8vupjZk=&c=ILaMIKN3p-80lY7su9z8xWgkNr6iFPRzW5LQOvs3U10bp0zUF-nc5g==&ch=Bc8hygDwEcJB4EsWovyZVdvRvb8LslolzW8XHj_5B6Pkwjj8CMPSSA==).
---
| Making sure every school in Rhode Island is safe and well-prepared is a complex, important operation. To make sure that you have all the information, I'll hold press conferences every day this week at 1 p.m. to give an update on our school reopening plans. I hope you'll tune in - staying informed is our best defense against the spread of COVID-19.
We're all in this together,
-Gina Raimondo Governor
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903
---
| [Unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=un&m=001_rvij1smacIHQplL2vH8YA%3D&ch=e9e38b2e-7e90-11ea-b887-d4ae5292c4bc&ca=17372755-a252-46ae-8c70-cb0fb9498f9f)
---

Sent by [communications@governor.ri.gov](mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov) powered by
[ ](http://www.constantcontact.com/index.jsp?cc=nge&rmc=VF19_3GE) [Try email marketing for free today!](http://www.constantcontact.com/index.jsp?cc=nge&rmc=VF19_3GE)

body:

Hoosier Republican,

Last week, we emailed you saying that this is an all-hands-on-deck election if we want to stop the Dems in Indiana. I just checked the list of our online donors from the last few days, and I didn’t see your name.

We’ve set aggressive goals this year, Hoosier Republican, in grassroots voter outreach. But in order to reach those goals, we need to keep on pace with a donation from you by midnight tonight.
End-of-Month Fundraising Status
Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Status: PENDING
Suggested Contribution: $25 (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-eom?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=PG_INGOP_EOMFinal_083120&amount=25&mc_cid=f57d4ed42f&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

Nancy Pelosi and her cronies are trying to expand their hold on Congress, and Indiana is on the frontlines of this battle. People like Victoria Spartz in the Fifth District are fighting for open seat elections and we can’t afford to give those seats up to the Democrats.

We set an aggressive grassroots goal because it’s what we will need to secure victory in November for Victoria and our local Republicans up and down the ticket – and I’m counting on you to help us reach it with your support.

Help us fight back across the state by chipping in $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, or what you can now! (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-eom?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=PG_INGOP_EOMFinal_083120&amount=25&mc_cid=f57d4ed42f&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

Thanks for your support,

Kyle Hupfer

P.S. There are only HOURS to go until midnight tonight, and – as we told you last week – it’s going to take all hands on deck to stop the Dems. Make a secure contribution right now, click or tap here (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-eom?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=PG_INGOP_EOMFinal_083120&amount=25&mc_cid=f57d4ed42f&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) .

name: Jeanne Shaheen
subject: What happened in New Hampshire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Team, this is urgent:
**On Friday, Donald Trump held a massive MAGA rally in New Hampshire. It was his _THIRD_ trip to the Granite State this cycle -- more than he's visited other key battleground states like Wisconsin, Michigan and Pennsylvania.**
Why? Because Trump and the GOP know that what happens in New Hampshire's Senate race could determine the future of health care and the Supreme Court.
At his rally, Trump doubled down on his commitment to turn New Hampshire red in November -- and end our chances of taking back the Senate for Democrats.
Trump and the GOP are all-in to defeat me, and my right-wing self-funding opponent is cashing check after check from his personal fortune to buy this seat. **I won't be able to fight back alone, everyone.**
**With Senate control hinging on this critical race, a generous group of donors stepped up to match every dollar until midnight TONIGHT to help us win in New Hampshire. I'm coming to you for urgent help:[Can I count on you to give $3 and _double your impact_ to defend New Hampshire's Senate seat and take back the Senate for Democrats?](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc52c/2a380d31/23181b9b/f0a3c7/3242769634/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0Y2pzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAyMDA4MzFfTVdINENKU19uYSIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4cjs?refcode=e20200831_MWH4CJS_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: WATCH LIVE: President Trump holds news conference at 5:30 p.m. ET
body:
Tune in at 5:30 p.m. ET today as President Trump holds a news conference from the White House. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=551d4dd82c&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • August 31, 2020
---
| | |
# **LIVE: President Trump holds news conference**

**Tune in** at 5:30 p.m. ET today as President Trump holds a news conference from the White House. After the event, you may also watch a recording of it using the link below.

[**Click here to watch President Trump's briefing!**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=eef42c90dc&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **Update: President Trump surveys damage from Hurricane Laura**

**President Trump** visited Texas and Louisiana on Saturday to survey damage after Hurricane Laura made landfall last week.

**As of today, FEMA** has delivered 324,000 liters of water and 811,400 meals in Texas, along with 3.1 million liters of water and 2.6 million meals in Louisiana.

🎬 [**WATCH: People of faith are helping families and communities recover**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fb7bec3b3f&e=3ee4985eea)

**“I want to thank** the men and women of FEMA and the first responders and the law enforcement, which we love and we cherish and are doing a fantastic job,” President Trump said in Louisiana.

**The President quickly approved** emergency declarations for Texas, Louisiana, Arkansas, and Mississippi, and local leaders praised the quick response and ongoing support from Federal officials over the weekend.

**“Of all the storms** I’ve been through—which, as you know, has been a lot—I’ve never received a swifter response from the administration. And so, on behalf of everybody in this room and everybody across the state of Texas, we want to say ‘thank you,’” Texas Governor Greg Abbott said.

🎬 [**WATCH: President Trump is helping Texas rebuild**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d9e3e297f9&e=3ee4985eea)

🎬 [**“Most powerful storm in Louisiana and Texas in 150 years”**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a615c5234f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **President Trump to visit Kenosha, Wisconsin, tomorrow**

**After yet another weekend** of violence and unrest in major democrat-run cities, Press Secretary Kayleigh McEnany briefed Americans this afternoon on the Administration’s ongoing response.

**While Democrat leaders** continue to condemn President Trump instead of the violent rioters, many local officials are thanking the President for stepping in where other politicians have failed.

**“Kenoshans are hurting** and looking for leadership, and your leadership in this time of crisis is greatly appreciated by those devastated by the violence in Kenosha,” [**a letter to President Trump**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=dc081ed991&e=3ee4985eea) from seven Kenosha County Board members reads.

**Wisconsin Governor Tony Evers** is not the first Democrat leader to make a media show of rejecting Federal support to score political points. Portland Mayor Ted Wheeler rejected Federal law enforcement assistance in a letter to President Trump on Friday. The next day, a man was shot and killed on Portland’s streets by a member of the far-left criminal group Antifa.

**Along with Portland** , Seattle, Philadelphia, Minneapolis, Chicago, and New York City have all seen major spikes in violent crime this summer. Their Democrat leaders have tried to appease rioters by allowing lawlessness to prevail.

**“I’ve stood behind this podium** and highlighted this issue for months,” McEnany said today. “While this President is always willing to show up, it is incumbent on Democrats to step up.”

🎬 [**Democrat leaders must stand up to anarchy, violence, and destruction**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a03cabb65f&e=3ee4985eea)

🎬 [**Murders in Portland alone have spiked 650 percent**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=473df86d3c&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **President Trump participates in an emergency operations center briefing in Orange, Texas** | August 29, 2020

---
|

---

If anything is clear after the Democratic National Convention, | [View in browser](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNTAwMTU3MTQ4NTk4OTAwMjE2JmM9aTJ1NiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zOTg3NzYyOTUmZD1rMXU5cDds.yfLLkhcYaLYx19xYgRKgf1i4qFk4xrEZBps8w-M_ljI)

| Hi , Wow! President Trump's Great American Comeback is off to a great start. If anything is clear after the Democratic National Convention, it’s that they’ll use any power they get to stop the recovery in its tracks and shut the economy back down. We can’t afford that! Americans are ready to get back to work. Their enthusiasm for President Trump's message proves they know Republicans policies will help our economy get back on its feet. [**I worked with President Trump to build our economy over the past three years, and I'm ready to do it again. Help me keep fighting for Oklahoma jobs with a quick donation of $25 or more to our campaign right now.**](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNTAwMTU3MTQ4NTk4OTAwMjE2JmM9aTJ1NiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zOTg3NzYzMDEmZD1lN2o4eDZt.WXhxdCkP-Zr-xSTqZ_o9dHKKihAfNI0XRK65gZD_8YY)

| |

| [ ](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNTAwMTU3MTQ4NTk4OTAwMjE2JmM9aTJ1NiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zOTg3NzYzMDQmZD1qM3Q2bjd3.6_jBpsg0q-R0AasolU8oe27bv3yEVQf_Z8mon1zhrA8)
---
---
| |
---
| President Trump has already proven that Republican policies work when it comes to creating jobs for the American people. Before the coronavirus lockdowns, 6.6 million jobs had been created since the inauguration. That included nearly half a million new manufacturing jobs! The unemployment rate had fallen to 3.5 percent in the U.S., and was even lower here in Oklahoma at 2.9 percent--the lowest in a generation! We took a hit with the coronavirus, but we’re already seeing new jobs being created, retail sales surging back and unemployment going down. We’re going to keep the economic comeback going by continuing what works: cutting taxes, reducing burdensome regulations and encouraging businesses to invest in America. I will be working with President Trump to continue those policies as part of the Great American Comeback. [**I won't be able to help America get back to work if liberal Democrats have their way. body:
**Team Scheller Victory Grassroots Update**
**August 31st** **Last Weeks Update:**
This week, the Scheller campaign was excited to welcome **32** new volunteers to the team! These hard working volunteers knocked on over **5,000** doors and made over **6,000** phone calls this week. Keep up the good work Team Scheller! Join the team by signing up [HERE](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=0048e1b6151c425483468e2f055b3e1c&_e=kHog3q5BWviSe71kHcum5zJ4H45fIQfU18hn9ipLsB58b17KI1-f4fd5Ddjsm8ZTqwnqpGEb8CxW1sT4ZjQ0E2TAuqNEBnWUX8Fg-tl3fLLIhhE15hrJ2_PKDDSgVKYPvNjmXOaqRFAErPcsPk0MWBgNziCjBXDySD0vQzgU7LSxvjWv6srLY_4b2zLkWECP54AsT5GE5xQ5o7sy94dPopcwkxh5qX7Zu3pVOzd9xKbNzRRKm7A0gYjmo4U6pQgXC3DqN84nBXhcZTr6aWgBVw%3D%3D) This week we had two very successful phone banks and three great door knocking events. Volunteers knocked on doors with Lisa Saturday morning and we walked with Ann Flood who is running for State Representative in district 138. In addition to this, The Scheller campaign was proud to roll out its first three coalitions Veterans for Scheller, Women for Scheller, and Farmers for Scheller. **Deb Krause, Whitehall PA.** Deb Krause is a native of Whitehall, Pennsylvania and served her community as a retired intergovernmental specialist. The grass roots strategy of the staff and campaign volunteers help to energize Lisa’s fight for change, courage & wisdom to help make Pennsylvania and the USA great again.” Great work, Deb! Thank you for your support. Have a great Monday! Team Scheller Paid for by Lisa Scheller for Congress, Inc.
