clean_body: Team Scheller Victory Grassroots Update August 31st Last Weeks Update: This week, the Scheller campaign was excited to welcome 32 new volunteers to the team! These hard working volunteers knocked on over 5,000 doors and made over 6,000 phone calls this week. Keep up the good work Team Scheller! Join the team by signing up This week we had two very successful phone banks and three great door knocking events. Volunteers knocked on doors with Lisa Saturday morning and we walked with Ann Flood who is running for State Representative in district 138. In addition to this, The Scheller campaign was proud to roll out its first three coalitions Veterans for Scheller, Women for Scheller, and Farmers for Scheller. This week we will be rolling out our last three coalitions which are Outdoorsman for Scheller, police for Scheller, and Hispanics for Scheller. This Week Moving Forward We will be sending out press releases in regards to the rest of our exciting coalitions HERE Click on these links to sign up to help Team Scheller this week! Hope to see you all there! Volunteer of the Week Deb Krause, Whitehall PA. Deb Krause is a native of Whitehall, Pennsylvania and served her community as a retired intergovernmental specialist. She works diligently to knock on doors for the Campaign and supporting Lisa any chance he gets. “I chose to join Team Scheller because she is the Congressional candidate we need more than ever representing PA 07 in Washington! The grass roots strategy of the staff and campaign volunteers help to energize Lisa’s fight for change, courage & wisdom to help make Pennsylvania and the USA great again.” Great work, Deb! Thank you for your support. Have a great Monday! Team Scheller Paid for by Lisa Scheller for Congress, Inc.

name: Team Joe
subject: Help Joe & Kamala get elected straight from your couch!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
With just 64 days left, we can't stop the momentum now. |
---

Peter, One of the most important ways we're going to win is by reaching out to supporters and voters where they are -- on their phones! Right now, we need to make calls so that we can turn out as many voters as possible. **Will you commit to calling your neighbors about the importance of joining Team Joe?** | | [MAKE CALLS ➞](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b11f/1cd0ac28/155b727ba/3570ba2a/2585403899/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.mobilize.us/2020victory/event/291103/?utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=digi_engagement--20200831--jb_em_weeklyorg_2020.08.31_b8_volunteer-calls-_x__f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_term=national")
---
It doesn't matter if you're new to the fight or have been with Team Joe since day one, every action you take is an act of fighting alongside Joe and Kamala.
The success of our campaign has always relied upon the strength of our grassroots team. And when we say our grassroots movement is powered by supporters like you, we really mean it, Peter.
Thanks for being in this fight and let's get to work!
Biden-Harris HQ
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b11f/1cd0ac28/155b727ba/3570ba29/2585403899/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b11f/1cd0ac28/155b727ba/3570ba28/2585403899/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b11f/1cd0ac28/155b727ba/3570ba27/2585403899/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b11f/1cd0ac28/155b727ba/3570ba26/2585403899/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b11f/1cd0ac28/155b727ba/3570ba25/2585403899/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b11f/1cd0ac28/155b727ba/3570ba24/2585403899/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b11f/1cd0ac28/155b727ba/3570ba23/2585403899/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b11f/1cd0ac28/155b727ba/3570ba22/2585403899/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden and Kamala Harris's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b11f/1cd0ac28/155b727ba/3570ba21/2585403899/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE AND KAMALA »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b11f/1cd0ac28/155b727ba/3570ba20/2585403899/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b11f/1cd0ac28/155b727ba/3570ba23/2585403899/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b11f/1cd0ac28/155b727ba/3570ba1f/2585403899/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b11f/1cd0ac28/155b727ba/3570ba22/2585403899/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Right now, we need to make calls so that we can turn out as many voters as possible. Will you commit to calling your neighbors about the importance of joining Team Joe? | | "" It doesn't matter if you're new to the fight or have been with Team Joe since day one, every action you take is an act of fighting alongside Joe and Kamala. The success of our campaign has always relied upon the strength of our grassroots team. And when we say our grassroots movement is powered by supporters like you, we really mean it, Peter. Thanks for being in this fight and let's get to work! Biden-Harris HQ | | "" "" "" "" Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. "" Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

body:
Our ability to run the best campaign possible between now and Election Day rests in part on your shoulders. |
---
Peter,

**In less than three weeks, Americans will start casting their ballots for Joe Biden or Donald Trump.**

The general election is here, Peter, and the hard truth is that the number of voters we can reach before they cast their ballots depends on how much money we can raise across the country right now.

**With less than 24 hours to go, we 're still $135,000 short of our goal for Pennsylvania in this final push of August -- and believe me, this is not a moment where we can afford to fall short.**

[**So I am urging you, Peter: please, do not wait until it 's too late. Chip in your first $25 or whatever you can afford right now, and help make sure we have the resources to win the early vote, and win this all-important election >>**](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_aug_eom?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.31_B3_JOD_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.31_B3_JOD_X__F1_S2_C1__full") | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

**I promise you that Donald Trump 's campaign is taking tonight's end-of-month deadline seriously.** They know that it's the first public deadline of the general election since our Democratic ticket was nominated, and they think they can outraise us for the second month in a row, and show the world.

But the truth is, our campaign has more on the line tonight. Unlike Trump, we rely on grassroots supporters like you for 97% of our campaign contributions -- so it's no exaggeration to say that our ability to run the best campaign possible between now and Election Day rests in part on your shoulders, Peter.

That's a big responsibility, I know. But it's also a big opportunity. It means that you have the power to make a real difference in this election, especially during this crucial time before early voting begins.

[**Your $25**](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_aug_eom?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.31_B3_JOD_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.31_B3_JOD_X__F1_S2_C1__full") could pay for the mailer that shares Joe Biden and Kamala Harris's story with a person who's never heard it.

[**Your $50**](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_aug_eom?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.31_B3_JOD_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=50&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.31_B3_JOD_X__F1_S2_C1__full") could fund the digital ads that catch the eye of an undecided voter who's spending more time online right now because of the pandemic.

[**Your $100**](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_aug_eom?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.31_B3_JOD_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.31_B3_JOD_X__F1_S2_C1__full") could help hire an organizer who makes sure that every last member of their community is able to get registered before the deadline.

[**And any amount you can afford**](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_aug_eom?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.31_B3_JOD_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.31_B3_JOD_X__F1_S2_C1__full") could help fund the safe and socially distant travel Vice President Biden will begin after Labor Day to visit with voters across the country leading up to Election Day. Your investments allow us to do this responsibly while staying competitive as voting begins.

We've said since day one that we're not taking a single vote for granted. Well, Peter, it's time to prove it.

[**Please, chip in your first $25 before midnight, and help us hit our end-of-month goal of raising $135,000 more from Pennsylvania before the deadline strikes >>**](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_aug_eom?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.31_B3_JOD_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.31_B3_JOD_X__F1_S2_C1__full")

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.

I need YOUR help to ensure that my campaign has the resources we need to reach every voter in New Mexico. | Ben Ray Lujan made it to the top of the DC political ladder to become Nancy Pelosi’s Assistant Speaker of the House. He climbed the ladder by cozying up to the Washington liberal elite and abandoning New Mexico's values. We are less than 65 days from the general election and the end of the month is just hours away. | | | New Mexicans will be voting in 64 days and we're running out of time. We can’t do this without you and we are so thankful for your support. Best wishes, Mark P.S. As the month of August draws to an end, our campaign is laser focused on growing our movement. | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY MARK RONCHETTI FOR NEW MEXICO ==

subject: Can we talk?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
This will be quick, friend |
---
Friend,

I just got out of a meeting with the team, and _we've fallen dangerously behind on our August fundraising goal._

Here's the deal, friend:

**We need to raise $20,000 by TONIGHT to close the gap. If we don't, we risk losing our momentum that's put us in a virtual tie with GOP Senator David Perdue.**

**[Friend, will you chip in $20 right now to help us get back on track BEFORE MIDNIGHT?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2b0e/5b2c1286/3825e89c/25f0cb7d/3702116314/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_31_ellen_talk_eom?refcode=em_2020_08_31_ellen_talk_eom&amount=20")**
| | [DONATE $20 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2b0e/5b2c1286/3825e89c/25f0cb7d/3702116314/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_31_ellen_talk_eom?refcode=em_2020_08_31_ellen_talk_eom&amount=20")
---

Friend, Jon is NECK AND NECK in the polls with David Perdue, and our momentum is off the charts.

_WE CAN WIN IN GEORGIA, but Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell have committed to spending millions to stop Jon from winning back this U.S. Senate seat._

The bottom line: We can't afford to fall behind.

**Friend, we need to raise $20,000 by the end of the night to hit our goal, so we can fund the vital digital organizing efforts, advertising spends, and voter protection programs needed to beat Sen. David Perdue!**

I am meeting with Jon tomorrow morning to go over our August fundraising numbers, and I want to be able to tell him what this grassroots team accomplished today.

Because we are in a great position to win.

**[Friend, can you pitch in $20 RIGHT NOW to help us elect Jon and retake the Senate?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2b0e/5b2c1286/3825e89c/25f0cb7d/3702116314/VEsF/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_31_ellen_talk_eom?refcode=em_2020_08_31_ellen_talk_eom&amount=20")**

name: Laura Loomer
subject: OBSESSED with Women!
body:
My Democrat opponent has shown her true blazing colors by focusing on identity politics throughout her career.
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-390961-921372-5169987-c3d4cc3bb2-d396d9c5d6)
Patriot,

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-390961-921372-5169987-c3d4cc3bb2-d396d9c5d6) My Democrat opponent has shown her true blazing colors by focusing on identity politics throughout her career.

One of the few bills she’s ever sponsored demanded that national amateur athletics associations report what they pay athletes, broken down by race and gender.

The bill, called the “Athletics Fair Pay Act,” didn’t get anywhere.

And I could have saved her the trouble and taxpayer expense of the research.

The U.S. Olympic Committee pays as follows: $37,500 for Gold, $22,500 for Silver, and $15,000 for a Bronze medal.

In 2018, Mikaela Shiffrin earned $37,500 for her win in the Giant Slalom while John Shuster and his all-male teammates took home the same for winning the Gold in Curling.

Equal accomplishment, equal pay.

Easy.

But Lois keeps looking to appease women voters with ridiculous legislation rather than addressing America’s REAL problems like JOBS, HEALTH CARE, and NATIONAL SECURITY.

In January, Frankel introduced a bill called, “Keeping Girls in School Act.”

Sounds valid, but if your read the fine print, Frankel’s bill isn’t about AMERICAN girls, **it’s about sending every other girl around the world to college . . . for free!**

Did that bill get anywhere? Thankfully, no.

But wait, THERE’S MORE!

Frankel also drafted the “Women and Countering Violent Extremism Act of 2019.”

When I read the title of the bill, I admit I was a little excited as there was a tinge of hope that Frankel was willing to quell the extremism of her Anti-Jewish, racist colleagues in Congress . . . Ilhan Omar, Rashida Tlaib, and AOC.

No such luck in stopping the spread of Sharia Law in America that oppresses women.

The bill aims to prevent women suicide bombers overseas with “women’s positive engagement.”

Confused? I've asked experts about that and they don't even know what it means.

Frankly, we’ve had enough of Frankel’s follies.

[Help me “positively engage” Lois Frankel by retiring her from her lackluster congressional career.](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-390961-921372-5169987-c3d4cc3bb2-d396d9c5d6)

[Donate just $10 today to help me defeat Lois Frankel](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-390961-921372-5169987-c3d4cc3bb2-d396d9c5d6) and remove another liberal from office who spends their day pandering to the Left. . . while ignoring her constituents.

Americans need leadership. They need members of Congress who are focused on GETTING AMERICA BACK TO WORK!

They need leaders unafraid to stand with their communities who are struggling to rebuild as the Left wants to keep us afraid and locked in our homes.

Help me get to Washington today by [donating whatever you can afford](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-390961-921372-5169987-c3d4cc3bb2-d396d9c5d6).

Thanks again for all that you do.

Sincerely,

Laura Loomer

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.

---
Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/unsubscribe/2-561017072-4395-390961-921372-84585d41bbe610b-d396d9c5d6)

---

| We recorded a campaign ad for TV this weekend, but we’re short of where we need to be to make sure it airs. Now, [we need to come up with an extra $7,000](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=88f2acd82b&e=140a9b81e7) **before midnight** tonight to make sure we can air this ad.

#

name: Team Warren
subject: Can you chip in $2 or whatever you can before tonight's fundraising deadline to help power Elizabeth and Warren Democrats?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
At midnight, we're facing the last end-of-month fundraising deadline for this quarter's FEC reporting period. After the deadline, we'll only have 30 days to hit our fundraising goal before a public re | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525073/45c30650/1c334eea0/66e8db8e/3739173937/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Right now, our movement is working to help elect Warren Democrats up and down the ballot in November.

And it's all thanks to grassroots donors.

But at midnight, we're facing the last end-of-month fundraising deadline for this quarter's FEC reporting period. After the deadline, we'll only have 30 days to hit our fundraising goal before a public report comes out.

**So, we'll get to it: We want these fundraising numbers to be as strong as possible. But right now, we're behind where we want to be to hit our goal.**

**[What happens between now and midnight is powerfully important-- and every bit counts. If you are in a place to donate, can you chip in $2 or whatever you can before tonight's fundraising deadline to help power Elizabeth and Warren Democrats?](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525073/45c30650/1c334eea0/66e8dbf1/3739173937/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLWF1ZzIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNVTIyRl9FT01fRUdSX1RfMjAyMDA4MzFfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-aug20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMU22F_EOM_EGR_T_20200831_V1S1_P")**

We're not going to beat Donald Trump and down-ballot Republicans by backing down -- we'll beat them by fighting back.

We fight back when we build a grassroots movement -- a movement that doesn't take money from lobbyists or fossil fuel giants.

We fight back when we call out corruption in Washington and have Democrats up and down the ballot advocating for the biggest anti-corruption platform since Watergate.

We're asking for your help today to keep powering this fight. With your help, we can hit our goal before tonight's fundraising deadline and keep growing this grassroots movement.

**[If you can during this time, please make a contribution before tonight's fundraising deadline-- we'd be deeply grateful.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525073/45c30650/1c334eea0/66e8dbf1/3739173937/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLWF1ZzIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNVTIyRl9FT01fRUdSX1RfMjAyMDA4MzFfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-aug20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMU22F_EOM_EGR_T_20200831_V1S1_P")**

Thanks for everything,

Team Warren

| [**DONATE NOW**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525073/45c30650/1c334eea0/66e8dbf1/3739173937/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLWF1ZzIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNVTIyRl9FT01fRUdSX1RfMjAyMDA4MzFfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-aug20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMU22F_EOM_EGR_T_20200831_V1S1_P")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Austin=20Harris?=
subject: We can win this
body:
| | | |
---
| Friends,

Our end of the month fundraising deadline is in 6 hours. Thanks to all of your generous donations, just in the last few hours, we are closer to our goal but we still need to raise another $2,320.

This congressional seat is a must win if we want to take back the U.S. House of Representatives. Polling shows this is one of the most competitive races in the country. Will you help us reach our goal by donating $25 today?

[Click here to donate $25, $100 or even $10 to help us flip this seat!](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=b0741e4528&e=16fac31a0f)

Thank you for your support!

Austin Harris
Campaign Manager

body:

| | Hi there — I wanted to reach out one last time before tonight’s big deadline. | | |

| Peter,
I want to make sure you saw Genevieve's email below. We've **got less than 6 hours left** until our deadline **and** **we're $4,291 short of our monthly goal**.

I know Genevieve can count on you to **[help close the gap](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=53f463500d&e=68aaeb0998)** , but I thought I'd send you this quick reminder anyway. Thank you in advance for [your support](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=fa6d6bc4dd&e=68aaeb0998). With your help, we'll not only reach our goal, but blow past it by the time the clock strikes midnight!

Rob Costello
Campaign Manager

From: Genevieve Collins <info@gcforcongress.com>
Date: Mon, Aug 31, 2020 at 12:46 PM
Subject: We're running out of time
To: Rob Costello <info@gcforcongress.com>

|

| Rob,
We're rapidly running out of time to **stop the defunding of police and riots from engulfing every major American city.**

I cannot sit by and watch our nation and our state be destroyed by this radical progressive agenda.

We have an **absolutely critical fundraising deadline tonight at midnight** , and [I need your help.](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=b9ba51b7f1&e=68aaeb0998)

| This fight in which we're involved is truly for the soul of our nation, and **we MUST win.**

**Nancy Pelosi and the progressive super PACs are fighting against me** , but I know that [you will do what it takes](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=7d7023d129&e=68aaeb0998) to help law and order prevail.

body:
But Sen. Cornyn's buddies are going to pull out all the stops over the last couple months.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fd8/7f51f7bc/42660c4a/4efaeeac/3698674201/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | I'll be straight with you, Peter: I wouldn't have gotten this far alone. I am so fortunate to have you and everyone else on my team on my side as I fight to bring true Texas values to Washington.

With August coming to an end, we're entering the home stretch of this campaign. We've worked so hard to get to this point, and we've got powerful momentum behind us. But with only two months separating us from Election Day, and we have to push even harder than before. We have to leave EVERYTHING on the field. **That 's why all donations made today will be matched until midnight.**

So I'm asking: **Will you make a MATCHED donation toward our end-of-month goal at this secure link?[https://mjfortexas.com/AugustEOM](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fd8/7f51f7bc/42660c4a/4efaeea3/3698674201/VEsE/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://mjfortexas.com/AugustEOM-nd")**

You know Sen. Cornyn won't make this easy. He's already on the air with TV ads, and he's got deep-pocketed corporate PACs shoveling money into his coffers. Here's the thing, though: **He can 't stop our momentum. **

This team is gaining steam -- fast. I'm just _one point_ behind Sen. Cornyn and I'm confident that if we hit our end-of-month goal tonight and carry that momentum forward, we can and we WILL defeat him this November. **[Are you with me?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fd8/7f51f7bc/42660c4a/4efaeea2/3698674201/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIwMTIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-augusteom-match-nd?refcode=email_20200831.3nd__2012__&amount=10")** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Friend,

This is a critical night for our campaign.

Our August fundraising deadline is just a matter of hours away – and we won’t be able to take back Congress in November without hitting these monthly goals first.

**Americans all across the country are counting on us this year.**

Our country desperately needs leadership in time like this.

Businesses are struggling, school districts are looking for answers, farmers are looking for support, and our police officers are calling for backup.

_But all Nancy Pelosi can offer them is partisanship, obstruction, and dysfunction._

**The good news is, we have the chance to change that in just a few weeks – but we need your help!**
[**CHIP IN BEFORE MIDNIGHT TO TAKE BACK CONGRESS**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=bf0d6a4e75344d4c952b43d951a5a851&_e=7OIXBhp_4fSjRfxGvppu8YwtzD8Y9s38JATO0bufc-fjg5u8LmVcsULS2XAA8YdAgDgLG5dP0RozTBpyMOmrrKzvjqOwYS5TtqLimbRfIQxqApdeLjahvb9rQVHEX7U0GA35RQZXMeYNHIyF0q_G1-MvYclbYzwjE5IaHELTFZIQv8HUz4hjRzQPsquUMEtbrgxxAIZ0U_fLJvKscU2uKPCu2LVNmSeVQkJGJ_vuLuIlfnbEPKgdOXmZb5IFDkGLYxjNRUK6wnOOcIeP21_Xj1_DPBIZu2lCNcQPTT2wUyh8srPvFFWXnzuoa9cazzzVyccyiPdE0ubG4rLNac5bMORrAPx7vPn8i9Hrfhm_OQfsIwjKD1j2C7DWhgKNG9Fph2QOUoxD09bGMuAXx00g6qaLL4jJcbK7wlYqhVVQvXGHuittnUwWWKzPCpqVzY7PHL2T4Etb5rnLD8T-2IScapkJtDfMgSVqXoDRWMHU0kY%3D)
Darin knows that restoring strong leadership to Congress starts with getting Nancy Pelosi out of the way – but he also knows that it’s a job that’s easier said than done.

September is going to be here in just a few hours and Election Day will be here before we know it. We can’t afford to waste any time in this fight.

name: Mark Warner
subject: re: We need a real change
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | Hi, Derek --

I wanted to make sure you saw my last note. We're just a few short months from the most consequential election in recent history and we can't afford to let up now. With your help, we have the real opportunity to make change and bring leaders that actually care about the American people.

This election is one of the most important in our lifetimes, and to make sure that we have a path to victory on November 3rd, we're looking for all the support that we can get to make sure we can flip the Senate.

Can I count on you? Here's the donation link: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-chipin**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db13/53d9897e/55d1d503/1c8801f6/2395084051/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc0NyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-chipin?refcode=20200831_f_2_nd__747__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")

Thank you for your support.

-- Mark Warner
\---------- Forwarded Message ----------
From: **Mark Warner**
Subject: We need a real change
> Dear Derek --
>
> Folks are saying this a lot these days, but it's true: we're living through an extremely challenging time.
>
> We're facing three crises right now: a global pandemic that has already killed more than 170,000 Americans, systemic racism in our justice system, and record unemployment numbers.
>
> We have a sitting President who has made known he might not accept the election results, and whose administration has set out to undermine the U.S. Postal Service -- a service millions of Americans rely on. And that's just in the last few months in a four-year pattern of incompetence and cruelty.
>
> Instead of providing real answers to the American people, Republicans in the Senate seem determined to make matters worse by stalling coronavirus aid and delaying meaningful criminal justice reform. I know my constituents are looking for answers -- and frankly I was hoping for more actual leadership from the administration. It's become clear that we're just not going to get it while Republicans control the Senate and the White House.
>
> **We need a real change -- we need leaders who listen as much as they talk and are ready to bring real solutions to folks across the country.**
>
> And we have a chance to make that real change in this election. I believe it's one of the most consequential of our lifetimes -- and I'm not just saying that because I'm on the ballot. We have the opportunity to replace Donald Trump with Joe Biden, and elect (and re-elect) Democrats up and down the ticket.
>
> There's a real path to flipping the Senate this year, and I know that my seat plays a big role in that. It just isn't possible to take back control of the Senate if we don't hang onto the seats we've already got.
>
> **[So if you have the means, please consider making a contribution to help me keep my seat in the Senate and keep working for the people of Virginia.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db13/53d9897e/55d1d503/1c8801f5/2395084051/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc0NyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-chipin?refcode=20200831_f_2_nd__747__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")**
>
> For everything you've done and everything you will do, I deeply appreciate your effort and support.
>
> -- Mark Warner
>
| [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db13/53d9897e/55d1d503/1c8801f4/2395084051/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc0NyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-chipin?refcode=20200831_f_2_nd__747__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")
---

|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db13/53d9897e/55d1d503/1c8801f3/2395084051/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

| | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
---

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Last call
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
We don't have millions like our GOP opponent.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8140%2E868730%2EfpOWxO) Friend, This is it: Our deadline is at midnight. We have just two months left to reach voters, and every single day counts. I know I've said this so many times, but I really live by it: _Early to bed, early to rise, work like hell and organize._ That mantra doesn't change, even if organizing looks different now than it used to. We still need to talk to voters, we still need to tell them our vision for a stronger future, and we still need grassroots donations. Our opponent has millions to fall back on thanks to the Republican Governors Association's war chest -- that's why we have to be prepared. **The dark money attacks are already up on TV. That's why I'm asking, because it's so important:[Will you donate $5 or more right now, before our huge midnight deadline?](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10933?t=4&akid=8140%2E868730%2EfpOWxO)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10934?t=5&akid=8140%2E868730%2EfpOWxO)

Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b293/18e32a7f/4a656be4/7b20fba6/1012086636/VEsHAg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, [_click here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b293/18e32a7f/4a656be4/7b20fba7/1012086636/VEsHDQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails").

If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. You can keep up with our campaign by visiting us on _[Facebook](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b293/18e32a7f/4a656be4/7b20fba4/1012086636/VEsHDA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan/")_ or _[Twitter](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b293/18e32a7f/4a656be4/7b20fba0/1012086636/VEsEBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan")_ or _[Youtube](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b293/18e32a7f/4a656be4/7b20fba2/1012086636/VEsEBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.youtube.com/c/benraylujan")_ or online at _[benraylujan.com](www.benraylujan.com)_. Click [_here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b293/18e32a7f/4a656be4/7b20fba5/1012086636/VEsEBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe") to unsubscribe and your request will be promptly processed.

People for Ben
PO Box 25371
Albuquerque, NM 87125
